Hey Peter, Sorry to bother you so late – on a Saturday, no less – but we’re working overtime tonight. The elections this November are incredibly important. They will decide the future of reproductive rights in rural parts of our country, like Virginia and Ohio. The media is distracted by former President Trump’s mugshot, but we need to get the word out to grassroots Democrats like you. Winning in November is going to take everything we’ve got. We need to stand up to defend Americans living in rural parts of our nation from the policies of MAGA Republicans who want to strip away the right to choose. **[So, that’s why we’re up late. We’re working to make sure that every candidate has what it will take to win this November and preserve the rights of rural Americans. Can we count on you to support us as we work to rush these resources to our body:
| | | Friend – Donald Trump here. I’m reaching out because our **[country is in grave trouble.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=c4cf093811d44667868d8b6ea0ee8c41&_e=sY1os9_il1kXxy0JmFxkOSs0XtaBLAMgfXtLa0Skr4BLadIE6aqr2AM7ZjrjXZ7HU_xP2Wr7TIWvqCG70d3ziz7yZfjh13eIDbnBpzxE8N2SRr-yzM6v4bPS_Tb00dslXdl9g7E5bC58mzkubqSX_Iz-aR1Zur4LOOJHgj09zl1yr2SQJ20u1lQTQ2USK_NuNXQ1lja1yngzeYjYvZOvbRWBTZIfOs3VFbD-SAI_-eb1E8dA5edLuLGApExvPe-RrCXXj8S9H_KdVywhOiPbEfk-mjnQZkverO3CI5NW4_Uts0wYPh-AbJuphhVH8HeAuUBmpy-3NIJw9fwzoJ1_aIRdwAXrJk5oGrwCfaV9kij4FZpTLOxYgfXyEgVW18IISPNazIIohXCQu01bjOIpgtm-YBbilvRydMs4zwKWBwbczei0lS6W3r-YQcmOF8f0a65IUj7juQSNGRGvN2GlVw%3D%3D)** Joe Biden and the Democrats have destroyed America in a few short years. With four more years, Biden will successfully transform America into a third-world country. name: John
subject: Celebrating Women’s Equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
On this day in 1920, the United States officially made it illegal to bar any citizen from voting on the basis of sex. It was the day that women could officially begin voting in our country. As such, today we’re celebrating Women’s Equality Day. | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_e=AzFyqJnCXSd53R5DPbTYFHlpqBCkiiRZQnOmjUPMEbSvMtM_BwFlcVWtmgc8ps2ckdJYyRyv-W8XbHD3jpFmjGJHA9Lc5WQVum6nSAzcTuvZk5Nk4gf7OhEY7fR3oIfGMJtVnmlGbzzAt2MKvkZHWJlHXALnC_lNsoLl_lPoH9zggJxqvOYNfoCPJGUjVil39g1kKZWmZVwqDOt7BAvnTLUJTHLBjeRNyRSoHHdDCcNbuHFI97u1eZqKUiURKodBuoXskQwqU9tJId2Gvxe2IO3QAgNkXMuo6w8TTT1Qe9HEOjimVtlwuXMOblEMC1B5BOosHS9Gjg5Q68X0O_jev3fAkFhq9HKBA06R0zLiVevfAjC9-6vI9zF9Fb7E5ErDODFlJLJbWiwKI5P1KwiOsFDEEhyXvMdH-FRNVGdwpKg%3D) On this day in 1920, the United States officially made it illegal to bar any citizen from voting on the basis of sex. It was the day that women could officially begin voting in our country. As such, today, we’re celebrating Women’s Equality Day. I’m proud to live in a country where my wife and daughter are granted the same rights as me and my sons – **but I also know that this country does not currently live up to its promise of equal rights and equal protection under the law when it comes to the right to make your own health care decisions.** Across the country, millions of American women live in states with Draconian laws barring them from obtaining an abortion. I believe women should have the freedom to decide what happens to their bodies, and **I believe it is wrong for some state governments to enact laws that interfere with those personal decisions.** **[So on Women’s Equality Day, I’m asking you to sign my petition calling on Congress to do the right thing, the American thing, and codify the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ into law.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_e=AzFyqJnCXSd53R5DPbTYFJ7g6C6yd61sDaapyVi7EzpWH-JHwkCzTHH-TIHfggo4LqEKcO9s16JKUzB2V-as23EEepjZ9uO5PEqmCHirndu-23J1p6jDM2nq7sohs2gnZFREJ3w4xz4BDZupms5qqKgjSVmEFL8F-6OV79FJPu7jTgmXAMKa48AVK09CvCWiwKcQhRTUACFIRFL07GZcwSTkkZbRdT3QY2ZI7qvjRpg%3D)** **[ADD MY NAME](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_e=AzFyqJnCXSd53R5DPbTYFJ7g6C6yd61sDaapyVi7EzpWH-JHwkCzTHH-TIHfggo4MPbiCOc4WKC8Mhgo2-jW2_xbeZqsCVCyvYeP3_l11q8Tuq_PYR_-t4g-xIR24MUsxAdR8eTG5rtAJYHUAnQQV_lHLgaNQ5Dd-dJMv6oyqn-JLvpYxbUd0SEvP04EinP8X6m440kDtSfqhE-qjxgURsMKMi_vb9yebrOh8B9bUbk%3D)** I want to live in a country that values the rights and freedoms of all equally. And codifying _Roe_ would be a step toward that future. I hope that you will join me. – John [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_e=AzFyqJnCXSd53R5DPbTYFHlpqBCkiiRZQnOmjUPMEbSvMtM_BwFlcVWtmgc8ps2ckdJYyRyv-W8XbHD3jpFmjGJHA9Lc5WQVum6nSAzcTuvZk5Nk4gf7OhEY7fR3oIfGMJtVnmlGbzzAt2MKvkZHWJlHXALnC_lNsoLl_lPoH9zggJxqvOYNfoCPJGUjVil39g1kKZWmZVwqDOt7BAvnTLUJTHLBjeRNyRSoHHdDCcNbuHFI97u1eZqKUiURKodBQrBofkrbIJcWu-b100cMHEY9xkrK_7Dis4weHZCHhRyIUX6mErxP3YXS_8kpgDJWHBIyw7jgC2LYD8wrw--FA3tdfNo71f3uEFXn9Gd0hI6fJOOusiQndUyBKiFup8SG94WPn0dTxVpv-dkYy9wuQMHS6gTfkDnIHN8uSEKbqp4%3D) **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_e=AzFyqJnCXSd53R5DPbTYFJ7g6C6yd61sDaapyVi7Ezr4msdK5ZpN65ZqP4Zob1V6Eihe0_Sel1nhuc5_Z7t0xJeJkJ5iDOEGWB1bpib4zEA-BP09D1_6E85BGgdtOKKKeT94XSjEUcTNfc7W4nJiU5yALqlSuyBLnjQ1qaRLisUosI6pco_z9d0d5yl_qcCuQTmQyfrTecUc6xBFoT4m4g%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_e=AzFyqJnCXSd53R5DPbTYFHlpqBCkiiRZQnOmjUPMEbSvMtM_BwFlcVWtmgc8ps2ckdJYyRyv-W8XbHD3jpFmjGJHA9Lc5WQVum6nSAzcTuvZk5Nk4gf7OhEY7fR3oIfGMJtVnmlGbzzAt2MKvkZHWJlHXALnC_lNsoLl_lPoH9zggJxqvOYNfoCPJGUjVil39g1kKZWmZVwqDOt7BAvnTLUJTHLBjeRNyRSoHHdDCcPs-gKkyHuTiZrGULWy9ff7bG8gMqUuFi53k7OWlxfXdQYw1dDPYUTuzjkW1mqWPgNql7YiX3P_AAVqk-pGWtUfGqvvn1USkc6cEkknZ9YAa40ewGXQHFWx6DY-BZMl5OeAUeWePPN_AMoFWdCv-WM-eEfbJlPrCwbqeeoYyRJnxXu2qSuiZ_YAK7sbt5f_5mbfJeZHXndMq-EF3ZOiQf-T) [**Unsubscribe**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_s=1b906d3f43104aa7bd9ec218b5c9cd07&_t=MfZO3EDB8MOavcdcEtBvekhlaZQf8-piWPjYzmtRGS8QjkM8yRGBWDaiY_M3lWA0v0JemOEtQjius26YtotsQLds3HYkFRFayoZ-ggzd31Q%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: On this day in 1920, the United States officially made it illegal to bar any citizen from voting on the basis of sex. It was the day that women could officially begin voting in our country. As such, today we’re celebrating Women’s Equality Day. | | | On this day in 1920, the United States officially made it illegal to bar any citizen from voting on the basis of sex. It was the day that women could officially begin voting in our country. As such, today, we’re celebrating Women’s Equality Day. I’m proud to live in a country where my wife and daughter are granted the same rights as me and my sons – but I also know that this country does not currently live up to its promise of equal rights and equal protection under the law when it comes to the right to make your own health care decisions. Across the country, millions of American women live in states with Draconian laws barring them from obtaining an abortion. I believe women should have the freedom to decide what happens to their bodies, and I believe it is wrong for some state governments to enact laws that interfere with those personal decisions. I want to live in a country that values the rights and freedoms of all equally. And codifying Roe would be a step toward that future. I hope that you will join me. – John My story is not unique. I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

subject: 🌍💙 Let's take action on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/climatechange?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=bee65f8665&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | Dear friend:

Earlier this month, I took to social media to share my thoughts on the pressing matter of climate change, and how environmental disasters and extreme weather events are becoming more and more frequent. Emphasizing that the failure of governments to curb carbon emissions, is causing the world to experience record high temperatures, more extreme weather events, and an unprecedented number of climate disasters. This issue is becoming apparent now more than ever, with the recent event that unfolded — Hurricane Hilary.
---
| As a candidate representing California's 34th Congressional District, I remain committed to championing these crucial environmental concerns and advocating for a sustainable future that safeguards our communities and neighborhoods. Los Angeles residents, including District 34, are highly vulnerable to extreme heat and weather, wildfires, drought, and sea level rise because our leaders have failed to listen to the science and take bold climate action. Hurricane Hilary should serve as a wake-up call that the time for change is now. We need representatives in Congress who are willing to stand up to the oil and gas lobby — ones who are not financed by the very same corporations who are destroying our planet. I have never taken a dime from fossil fuel companies, and I never will. 🌍💙

That is why we need YOUR help and support. Join me in this critical mission by becoming a monthly recurring donor of $34 to our campaign. By pledging your support, you're contributing to a movement driven ONLY by grassroots power and fueled by the passion of individuals who are determined to change the outcome of our future. [Click here to contribute!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=43d08fbb79&e=fee98d637f) 💪🌟

Together, let's drive real change!
---

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: A Biden appointed judge just made a ruling that sent Republicans’ heads spinning
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 27, 2023

A Biden appointed
judge just made a ruling that sent Republicans' heads spinning

Radical leftism is spreading
around the country. But thanks to Joe Biden, that spread is
happening quicker than anticipated.

And a Biden-appointed judge just
made a ruling that sent Republicans' heads spinning.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This attack on Donald Trump
may have sealed his fate for 2024

The hits keep coming
for former President Trump. But this one might be the knockout
blow.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump is fearing for
his life after being asked this haunting question

The former President
has been asked many things throughout his political career. But
nothing as jaw-dropping as this.
➞ Continue Reading

Breaking: This report could
change everything for Trump

Democrats are
constantly trying to back Donald Trump into a corner. But one
revelation might break him free.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun is saving journalism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Dear Fellow American, **I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.**

**I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.**

But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. **Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day.** I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
**Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism.**** ** This is one mission that our country desperately needs.
---
---
**Larry Kudlow** Columnist for The New York Sun
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger._ncpVU33SDhQ)
---
|
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsp016glprucubfdd54ahec8fnqb4kskbalqgg0o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8j2ok0n1q6gko654opacu8ce209ig58u21fneco_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1c5h2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlmhlus6o8b3tka02ju65tubahlq5aj33f7377a8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1c5h2bs)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What a night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Did you see the debate?

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6fqlgdcem8u4jjaq9b1201lki6qqenb18s6d3u0_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
Fellow American,

When I stepped off the stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big tonight's victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7p8fjpointpfjmvj7vke793vjjnuag2m3apno9g_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Fellow American, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and together, let's make America our first priority.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zop15fl1et120q7t90m4u94optuges5ui1515q2g_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)**

_Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution?_

America First,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr1p1t3ltdd2hrea2c2h3lsglno3rp3ukgn9acoo_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znmo0kq3ico113qbltki1hcisg9st759am09uqog_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu02j0mk3s3dm8lqvske9nfq7dqvsqv78nc37gco_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)

---

clean_body: Did you see the debate? | Fellow American, When I stepped off the stage, I could feel electricity in the air. This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute. For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big tonight's victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences. | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different: I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to SHUT THEM DOWN , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it. We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done. I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us. Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution? America First, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. name: ICYMI News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk8vrmri2ekugcbj1lcun8eg7oa8csq6q25h40ug_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za0cpq7s1jgabhoffqqcfau2962lu3an7h24snug_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zes9u3j2aad3l29elgf2jotm30k5n11qmomm5gfg_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsfkgba0fq6u915gopllp1e0j3g1tk984alcdir0_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zom659s61e8cc3lfvan2h77cr1111cib4phk43e8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za36l28bd95sd3vnn5h2mgh8gtsvvg52r208h69o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcku5qusvov8ra8d7rvnejo3knqoh5084ne61kb0_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhbppma3k3b1m7qglflvnckfn59p383d371a7a0o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdfb48pm7eqj3t57m39bqmc81nid2uqlk5s9r04o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zck1hha81t7gcdcv1majbsfi14rntjpua6820rto_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg2pbq0948scm7hdvps9sl0jhdb04kummcufn3u8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmm859s7mjm1i46b96c7qjk96blbbso74smg7h38_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmb1lmjvlmvtn28igndmb77k192cttt71orl04bo_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8h8ipkclhu3hkm3v9o6gsrgvccm55khb24c61do_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znckm3agooi4n68hpm8bdgbkpg74adp94ru36hj8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7uhveuhqam5h1s1edd4673a45mi852kli90evno_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5r299gi6jdgfegeqnf9vosn2f9kfer16giik7mo_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob1cjh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you: | | | Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions. | I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for." In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Elizabeth BeShears
subject: Gov. Abbott needs our support in this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
we are at a crucial moment in the fight for education freedom in Texas

| | | ****
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgpojhrnj9nidj0hehj97qge5jbca10rvfoc8c5g_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob3c5h2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, we are at a crucial moment in the fight for education freedom in Texas, and **we need your voice to make a difference! ** **_FIRST,_** Governor Greg Abbott championed and called for expanding school choice to millions of Texas families. **_THEN,_** the state House presented a watered-down version of the bill due to a few school choice opponents. And Governor Abbot threatened to veto it.
**_NOW,_** Governor Abbott has said he will call a special session to ensure they do right by Texas families and pass meaningful school choice expansion.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5gkaiiur5npb379s1detb2svt3uuae38ovn3gg_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob3c5h2bs)
---
The American Federation for Children is working tirelessly to ensure that school choice is expanded to every student in Texas, and **[they need your support.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfb7a1j1hmc6fuqpouhqc1ms3f6elb9d0pdfcpv0_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob3c5h2bs)** This fight for school choice in Texas is not just about Texas—it's about every American who believes in education freedom. National teachers unions are already getting involved and will stop at nothing to prevent the passage of education savings accounts. **We must band together and rally support for Texans**. If we want to see school choice become a reality nationwide and parents to regain control over their children's education, we need your voice today.
---
[**STAND WITH TEXAS: SIGN NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi8duegi5qkaofhe3c494lh7lukr8f42tuh9mcp8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj60ob3c5h2bs)
---

As a result of the recent conflict in the Gondar region of Ethiopia, there are 11,000 Jews who need to be rescued. The urgency is escalated each day. Some are scared to leave their home in order to communicate the Israel Foreign Ministry and the airport has been shut down in the area. The Genesis 123 Foundation is seeking to help rescue and resettle these Ethiopian Jews so we can close the door on this ancient diaspora community and integrate them into a better life in Israel. "In order to fulfill this mission, we URGENTLY need to raise $97,276.52." Once they arrive in Israel, they will face major hurdles. They have nothing, no education, no job, and they are coming from a highly undeveloped nation and truly destitute, to one of the most developed nations on earth. The Genesis 123 Foundations is facilitating several meaningful ways for you to help. "Food"Immediate Needs \- Ethiopian Jews often live in mud huts without electricity. They need help immediately on arrival to find a home and get their basic needs met – cooking appliances, clothing, grooming supplies—they need everything. "Donate $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to help us provide these basic needs!" "Children"Helping the Children Integrate. name: Elizabeth BeShears
subject: Texas just became a battleground state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
we are at a crucial moment in the fight for education freedom in Texas

| | | ****
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1r4s8ks34h6tff7pttfvvbajpsn38q9ms93vmr8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj62o31cdh2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, we are at a crucial moment in the fight for education freedom in Texas, and **we need your voice to make a difference! ** **_FIRST,_** Governor Greg Abbott championed and called for expanding school choice to millions of Texas families. **_THEN,_** the state House presented a watered-down version of the bill due to a few school choice opponents. And Governor Abbot threatened to veto it.
**_NOW,_** Governor Abbott has said he will call a special session to ensure they do right by Texas families and pass meaningful school choice expansion.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqu88ee183ssr48sbn80g6eg7nli05kahrn8h08o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj62o31cdh2bs)
---
The American Federation for Children is working tirelessly to ensure that school choice is expanded to every student in Texas, and **[they need your support.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgsqktnlepdk3iba3ba6pitnhe4ll31vp8q9nj9o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj62o31cdh2bs)** This fight for school choice in Texas is not just about Texas—it's about every American who believes in education freedom. National teachers unions are already getting involved and will stop at nothing to prevent the passage of education savings accounts. **We must band together and rally support for Texans**. If we want to see school choice become a reality nationwide and parents to regain control over their children's education, we need your voice today.
---
[**STAND WITH TEXAS: SIGN NOW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zke5mt6q4nt94hch78k193sf2gffpjdcjdlt5r2o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chj62o31cdh2bs)
---
| | Thank you, Elizabeth BeShearsDirector of State Communications StrategyAmerican Federation for Children
---
| | |

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I’d like to make sure you know what I’m fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you’re just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I’d like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I’m running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I’m asking for your support.** _**Here’s my story**_ : I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation’s freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That’s why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
But here’s the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They’re telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation’s oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It’s about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob’s fraud.**_
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I’m not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GAWmTuOZb48vO1qrA%2byDhQ&sysid=1)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675868%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=70%2flbgLYd5SFVXkOw4TX0w&sysid=1 "Please, join me in
fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLsi29Cpf1J3zz3KdFqqug&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c675869%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aGz%2fhVxrttitpOyEXvPcEA&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy.
