name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7PtYI1yPZjpkcUwk0K9euPwX5Cpe0U2LMfdefevV5LXn6Bzg4j28odIMZlvmwP5Agwpsq3py-PQDGojWzYhOCRJ1j1XyjKMHMFWNkN7XE5X2v12Td4Iw2fp2-eGXXax6jQSq1YTKaUTo4f-_M2wQ91E%3D)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7Plgv85R6B8-mo_w0aREipfy8pFz806At0wampBM7zFdA7EF9dfzOhh17co_ALDH0lfCNMkR58y0DzZpF0zTv8dSSwZHndqp0PBCykd0HE3WfUl2qe4t8yzMGXghfW17HNrEoKR9YMQIsoCDbWtudnw%3D)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7HdWcTF58LaFG-S9dj-OOnoCTVqSsatMquIl4o81Hcn3vTPGCqTOalFIaQ0VN2AD0CyUEcHEG-EdnP8EvWi6C8AIRYMlBKtIF3glHr-_cBL5XPPE_5oefCyID5Fd_TnRXGclpU5kzW3y5bpG9t0PiOg%3D)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7D_PYkEKrVEMg-LoH9bw4dIyOUBF7vVSQWjzTepFqUHxUXbTPJnqNnQCH_dBFqFUTfjNf_1OB-CcCJ_t6LlEyNqAyjN0S2Zpa_x-GMi_682qwlCYds6EknTVJ0XGmo5leMIIMGMf3iZ3NiYKsCDwYUk%3D)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7JVqXzZnq0RK6r272HQJWJYL4BwaPu6t16TVJyMxydQAq8GHm6_C1A-cRbjeffdkiyl_F20awERy872irq96ry8ya064dZnib4tCiCBkZ2lPVOV4lWGRKEzqO5AB92il-jscDgNOqPnJZM6X71d3UGM%3D)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7FKkoLzEvVCrFBnqDo9TBR8mVL_bhxQ1JpfOVV1kJPO6pk1RhjOzXhZpa-g2uqY-KtdnnYKLbpzwWOaTFP6L2WzQblM7uMlpQDn89JZIA5199fSIjNYrK68g_tNrirAdf9zCMXUeH-o7Lj-bB35cRTM%3D)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7NprEvPxoE7H8cCWDzs6rhpjgyG_kBDUggeXXtDBK4KfBSXF6fswz0J0dBd98zeIXVRWBcyAouka7_ebUO7zC_PM0Xng40v2XwjmNsvvJWLulzJjwG_ySaIsofoLli-TefF_fMymHqMEHiLwfQ2CNRs%3D)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7CYYKBenmfJcaIkoyOY0macPqxq2UDTvfk1GMHRbOlAPecTmoqJlyaYa_YoTFwdzJudCbQ5_9h6vQcxqqmbrxDp0To78qMQRxjneE0o6y78O_B4V9ugSaU1HEx-cwPe7CpC4AIbXruV8ifPmfL9dxTE%3D)
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7JAV0ZSHLzgfkQt_WiMeRBERLTSuXnMqCDvkt1Zq3--we_KqhlkpFh7rz37mqp5mKVBF_e-the-ZLJlGlo_zf4JbBpDlgxluZhWALbtckpNgJbupqYfpQSO23QnsWz0N6fIldhVQ5Bxu0JZ6KU65ljk%3D)

| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15bc79e9c3447488e02083bbd220282&_e=Jfil97xLY6eeUgyJP5Pzaos2iJubb6-FmEUEt5PixpCW8Ik-xIuyctuPXo9RbbIdfJCwpHbwkcWf8PyrSOsO_ffQdQnOwrAeQU_Pjgl3qxHYtC-WIDC9nWFFiP9ZQ8LKTicliQYkzbEs2j65dBoiDO6kQvc8a3MMBPF1hhLC-Ae1tDzlLxRSl0HLZDQgH4AfjUsMlK0JletXRpvZLn4_paQEb_AsiBNT-EG7-R3Dr0QnW5Am2aEEajqJFPNxXdPHPrubAAoLqxXvReoVbdAD7PPlXzhrYyvkzybfEfZF2XnMVFL2r3fPS87RFOC-mPFlP0UYq8cyM8v9XdTj9mKDJXvsFqffe3I9bslfs_9HAUtNLkY_keQleOky0yRR9O4j2FL7OqxC1eI5VswPg8bz5_e9oHFbRSFolU1IWKsYlWw%3D)

Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support. Here 's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1. | Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey. | As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now: Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC; Ranks number one for new business formations; Ranks number one for net in-migration; Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states; Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York; Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report; Has NO state income tax; Has a crime rate at a 50-year low. I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom. | But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud. | Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW. | | | I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you: | | | Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions. | I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60a5dd5c79d4acb8091060dc30db411&_e=BoTXYcqHJ7SG_3zaMlyrYWVVSQ2QDPgHg7y5WbMArXD8xo8kRZ4pwlg84ZtXNxtLGc0_ipTaFA2VvHiRA2kegdjz7JqJvfUSV7TuJFBrXaHHk02URwjZyJXh2C44aM4burXbgdhzC1_41n6dUr1IdzbNe2Wp3Mh3QZrkO8oxlt4PlYj1VTTnkAlkk9Agh0OpBjbnTqalk45acMaCVBSPK1nNX_FHfDLG0dwY3oKmbD85L7ssUQee1qeRcLQ1DfI6-lt5tfUJACTEsDriQmhnvjkg8NolgLJZfArDGDm9Bp2zg8gly6P7m_2TULCqe86HlZO9J8a9jCQy--bWPBlk3akWYUN8VEwRv8o9QqqS0XqavDffC88-WF_N50-xm8HqxctPWXy-PCoBCnOeSx8g-Q%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
Friend,
Make no mistake, this campaign is about you, but my team created a four-part interview series highlighting my public service. Today, we focus on my experiences as a rural family doctor, starting in Navajo Nation.
Let me know what you think...
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
➤ WATCH THE NEW VIDEO ➤ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
Creating media isn't cheap. Any contribution you can make today, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings] large or small, in support of our message would be greatly appreciated. If you've donated recently, thank you! This is partly where your investment has gone.
if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
Friend,
I grew up in a lower working-class family in rural America.
My family didn't have much. My parents worked two jobs to stay afloat, but our home was filled with love, laughter, and hope for a better day. Like many families in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we made it work with grit, tenacity, and perseverance.
I found my calling as a family doctor. My work has focused on caring for economically disadvantaged patients like me. I have advocated for change in our broken healthcare system for 40 years.
I have been dedicated to serving the underserved, including veterans with PTSD, children with behavioral health issues, our Native communities, seniors, and Medicaid recipients.
It's been the greatest honor of my life; providing healthcare to the most resilient people on the planet — Yoopers and Northern Michiganders.
I then expanded my service globally, serving my country for 10 years as a US diplomat.
But I am not done giving back. I want to continue serving others. That's why I'm on this journey to Congress.
I have been a champion for the working class throughout my entire life. I worked my way from community college to earning three advanced degrees.
Despite being born on the other side of the tracks, I found success and want to ensure the next generation can do the same.
Because my story is improbable in today's economy.
Many people struggle paycheck to paycheck, unable to afford healthcare, childcare, and post-secondary education. Citizens are burdened with insurmountable medical and student debt. Our children face a mental health crisis and a severe lack of affordable housing.
Now more than ever, we need principled leaders who can cut through divisions, roll up their sleeves, and get to work.
I am running for Congress to provide the same opportunities I was given as a child. I am running to be the leader I needed growing up.
Every citizen in Northern Michigan, the Upper Peninsula, and all across rural America deserves not just to survive, but to thrive.
Many politicians claim they want to be your voice in Washington. Hardworking rural Michiganders already have a voice of their own. They need a listener. And I've heard those voices loud and clear my entire life. I want to elevate and carry them with me as we embark on this journey to Washington together.
Together, united, standing shoulder to shoulder, we can move Michigan's 1st district forward.
Join us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
STAND WITH ME. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

My parents worked two jobs to stay afloat, but our home was filled with love, laughter, and hope for a better day. Like many families in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we made it work with grit, tenacity, and perseverance. I found my calling as a family doctor. My work has focused on caring for economically disadvantaged patients like me. I have advocated for change in our broken healthcare system for 40 years. I have been dedicated to serving the underserved, including veterans with PTSD, children with behavioral health issues, our Native communities, seniors, and Medicaid recipients. It's been the greatest honor of my life; providing healthcare to the most resilient people on the planet — Yoopers and Northern Michiganders. Friend,
I grew up in a lower working-class family in rural America.
My family didn't have much. My parents worked two jobs to stay afloat, but our home was filled with love, laughter, and hope for a better day. Like many families in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we made it work with grit, tenacity, and perseverance.
I found my calling as a family doctor. My work has focused on caring for economically disadvantaged patients like me. I have advocated for change in our broken healthcare system for 40 years.
I have been dedicated to serving the underserved, including veterans with PTSD, children with behavioral health issues, our Native communities, seniors, and Medicaid recipients.
It's been the greatest honor of my life; providing healthcare to the most resilient people on the planet — Yoopers and Northern Michiganders.
I then expanded my service globally, serving my country for 10 years as a US diplomat.
But I am not done giving back. I want to continue serving others. That's why I'm on this journey to Congress.
I have been a champion for the working class throughout my entire life. I worked my way from community college to earning three advanced degrees.
Despite being born on the other side of the tracks, I found success and want to ensure the next generation can do the same.
Because my story is improbable in today's economy.
Many people struggle paycheck to paycheck, unable to afford healthcare, childcare, and post-secondary education. Citizens are burdened with insurmountable medical and student debt. Our children face a mental health crisis and a severe lack of affordable housing.
Now more than ever, we need principled leaders who can cut through divisions, roll up their sleeves, and get to work.
I am running for Congress to provide the same opportunities I was given as a child. I am running to be the leader I needed growing up.
Every citizen in Northern Michigan, the Upper Peninsula, and all across rural America deserves not just to survive, but to thrive.
Many politicians claim they want to be your voice in Washington. Hardworking rural Michiganders already have a voice of their own. They need a listener. And I've heard those voices loud and clear my entire life. I want to elevate and carry them with me as we embark on this journey to Washington together.
Together, united, standing shoulder to shoulder, we can move Michigan's 1st district forward.
Join us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bobsbeginnings]

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: How did this man get elected?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=6b94c65adb064723be00d028e9918b9d&_t=onb7kTu9mjfbvnpIeEAHx1P0M5Ls0jUXRKPqUhC0FCydfktmp1q1803-XtrW-ZCnDbCIsvexxtGTjzjg6QxQTs8j1gh5rWGuP_Yyf32Gnuk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=6b94c65adb064723be00d028e9918b9d&_t=onb7kTu9mjfbvnpIeEAHx1P0M5Ls0jUXRKPqUhC0FCydfktmp1q1803-XtrW-ZCnDbCIsvexxtGTjzjg6QxQTs8j1gh5rWGuP_Yyf32Gnuk%3D)

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6b94c65adb064723be00d028e9918b9d&_e=_haR-sjmDEC7mfbrieYki-CidoN0nwVIjxKxS9rYswLbLBPRnpGkrkceBbkIT0NTvdAVOg1vd8uTi2zb8bQEXug3gq5J2UbmH6F08WNZMW7U5irlhFrInYfRnUQe0F2D7iuW0RLRRaPtv_tAd4qfLMw3xHNABvVpMZOe48otee2nc5AnDEKHb45xtp5WplK2u5tH39QkYOxdN9BvtQs3s83vgeyWocBkF6r7sA2uZPfP-BerobdP7zWLu8py2EP18or0j4RL-egxDhOQI6t4R4VoicOWTahEHYOEk1R1_e-M6Bm5bElYh3nENR57krTlypbYy02i7HgaG7cOfthognqIiOZh8u-TTdabfgzhAjb9CH3jWOImH5voIawGi9btOiHglf3-B51QPa-7yAO_CY-lQXSAtZ9cve7J3QhgmkE%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6b94c65adb064723be00d028e9918b9d&_e=_haR-sjmDEC7mfbrieYki-CidoN0nwVIjxKxS9rYswLbLBPRnpGkrkceBbkIT0NTvdAVOg1vd8uTi2zb8bQEXug3gq5J2UbmH6F08WNZMW7U5irlhFrInYfRnUQe0F2D7iuW0RLRRaPtv_tAd4qfLMw3xHNABvVpMZOe48otee2nc5AnDEKHb45xtp5WplK2u5tH39QkYOxdN9BvtQs3s83vgeyWocBkF6r7sA2uZPfP-BerobdP7zWLu8py2EP18or0j4RL-egxDhOQI6t4R-I_L8mqynYW5gea0OaTOIe-60joUI08kWjy2mieHNGk2QxX4TZ1iR3L9siaAM4fcBMDVG9dxAmh2Y_6CriwQlcvEf5ZNXiKLNm4OJDWvl-btVF75rrhMNVpMnEl2fPz_Lb5svnK9LVXg6TublN834Q%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6b94c65adb064723be00d028e9918b9d&_e=_haR-sjmDEC7mfbrieYki-CidoN0nwVIjxKxS9rYswLbLBPRnpGkrkceBbkIT0NTvdAVOg1vd8uTi2zb8bQEXug3gq5J2UbmH6F08WNZMW7U5irlhFrInYfRnUQe0F2D7iuW0RLRRaPtv_tAd4qfLMw3xHNABvVpMZOe48otee2nc5AnDEKHb45xtp5WplK2u5tH39QkYOxdN9BvtQs3s83vgeyWocBkF6r7sA2uZPfP-BerobdP7zWLu8py2EP18or0j4RL-egxDhOQI6t4R7ux3j6xomv7JF0ou5Ls9C__gCAsO3mi6mGuKpCMhoxIKZseea2rmHd--HSeDFEIgOwLGpRPShPognwGAzIFBUqNrnOcNogRQeRJCPnzBwsiwxNecBX7JE06cskabGVbgflSmHS2SeVBTrLYf7LZHDs%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6b94c65adb064723be00d028e9918b9d&_e=_haR-sjmDEC7mfbrieYki-CidoN0nwVIjxKxS9rYswLbLBPRnpGkrkceBbkIT0NTvdAVOg1vd8uTi2zb8bQEXug3gq5J2UbmH6F08WNZMW7U5irlhFrInYfRnUQe0F2D7iuW0RLRRaPtv_tAd4qfLMw3xHNABvVpMZOe48otee2nc5AnDEKHb45xtp5WplK2u5tH39QkYOxdN9BvtQs3s83vgeyWocBkF6r7sA2uZPfP-BerobdP7zWLu8py2EP18or0j4RL-egxDhOQI6t4R4BovxPMYhAufz2KJUHOB-QQhn3OOp9c41osArxSJYfFlJFio-rIM-srK1XaUpHMOU1N3CvMz8yWUNZ_o54pfABmhdCwmofLIIKNKIpisLYQ3NiAJtfFeD9jPjr2UNwkvBoNffbNyzY9dQYcO9qp4bs%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon. Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ [Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help ...” He’s right – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS. Meanwhile, Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time. I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. I know Jon Tester is vulnerable Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable **But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter. Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity. Right now, we’re losing the money game. Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference. Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future. I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country. Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too. You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: you need to know his name. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months. Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The battle to restore American journalism
body:
It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6k658gvb5ng8g8prfo3ji36gekvrfrv7g0775ho_rp22sh2s8i66p76chimaor2c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugrm6cb265rmfd1lcar61dj0e9rjaollehqr4ojnccp34tlksmrr2o34e5on0ppnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphimapm1o3i6lj32c5jc5jr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zild0mc61f38q3l2crm9kp3344mrke3meupj22q8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chimaor2c9h2bs)
---
|
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhuslm2dnmc6096d8kalu400e4u682j0vf35s5c8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chimaor2c9h2bs)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Friend, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2hurers8q4jjqd34jgdc0577n8lb1cslpgs1hbo_rp22sh2s8i66p76chimaor2c9h2bs)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpp7a73srsfi16o443i7u1cnk0hafd3p1qkn2tu8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chimaor2c9h2bs)
---
Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
---
**Alan Dershowitz** Columnist, The New York Sun
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqpbkcq61paon6c348un25e9shner6n6dh4um9bg_rp22sh2s8i66p76chimaor2c9h2bs)
---
|

| | | Fellow American,

| | Peter, It’s April Cao.

When my husband Hung decided to run for the U.S. Senate, it wasn’t a solo decision. It was something we prayed about as a family, because we knew whatever came our way, we’d have to work as a team.

Now, I’m so excited for what’s to come in the next year, and I’m so excited to be working with patriots like you to send my husband to the U.S. Senate.

But if we’re going to win, we have to get down to business.

We’ve set an ambitious **$10K Donor Drive Goal** for **midnight tonight** , and right now, we’re about halfway there.

[**Please, will you pitch in now to send this American hero to the U.S. Senate and help us meet our goal?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=19d598759beb43e38c721746d6cccaf7&_e=0jEcS8Aq_DxCMInSRdt-9svqGGseYY6HceEEyB3iW6R2_kwh-B32x2BCWiqX2g7PR8BJiSNPgf4sHOVuZ6-j-9uIK0wBDRFy4BoKqLLvq1N8yLf2-HwL1-ba7he3rFOQ2VFW4AHmlJJZJeLSFFLyjGSWyOydi7YH4eGhtkEGwjnCk4_b2X1tGIbMMGMRlJCEn8UCZyMdBq5sSW5x1LJJLnjnI6XSkB6Cu2-Z43fT0XApvlp7Ce3cCDcQHuOx4Ww8L39uyPMG7ZOMG8xf6-EVygSYJSB9dteGYuP1bu3cYn7JqPJW1GPq1HFKep49UnjQUQYoSKzEsBrbnIzJxID4WURLwrcA_k5fiuRmWuYlN-Lfjs_X7H-a1mxTGBIMDqX_)

Hung shows up in every aspect of his life, whether it’s for me, our children, or this campaign.

I married him because I knew he was kind, hardworking, loyal, and shared the same values that I do.

Standing by him at every phase in his life, from his 25-year Naval career to the campaign, has been an honor.

Now, I hope that you’ll stand with us, but time is running out to meet this critical goal.

[**Pitch in ASAP so we can meet our $10K goal by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT and help us start off this campaign strong!**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=19d598759beb43e38c721746d6cccaf7&_e=0jEcS8Aq_DxCMInSRdt-9svqGGseYY6HceEEyB3iW6R2_kwh-B32x2BCWiqX2g7PR8BJiSNPgf4sHOVuZ6-j-9uIK0wBDRFy4BoKqLLvq1N8yLf2-HwL1-ba7he3rFOQ2VFW4AHmlJJZJeLSFFLyjGSWyOydi7YH4eGhtkEGwjnCk4_b2X1tGIbMMGMRlJCEn8UCZyMdBq5sSW5x1LJJLnjnI6XSkB6Cu2-Z43fT0XBaFshd7BlRbkW7Dj-bOFBJIhRixvXHab2HnkF2sL5Fyf7z-NHG5M9v-5dmL1ud4E2RZkJ6Aac9BZOs_O8cbwJyEWctPEPvCFoMyoU30eJHxsL76vPT_vnkL0fq_7fQQYH7NehJ_5jCv8NcrC70EfvI)

Hung shows up in every aspect of his life, whether it’s for me, our children, or this campaign. I married him because I knew he was kind, hardworking, loyal, and shared the same values that I do. Standing by him at every phase in his life, from his 25-year Naval career to the campaign, has been an honor. Now, I hope that you’ll stand with us, but time is running out to meet this critical goal. | | Thank you, April Cao | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Cao for VirginiaPO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Forbes features Kennedy’s ‘working classcapitalism’ plan
body:
RFK Jr.’s economic strategy for restoration of the middle class.

| | |
---
Peter, **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is unique among presidential candidates for advancing practical, sweeping policies to restore the middle class.** Forbes contributor Michael Bernick this week [**highlights RFK, Jr.’s economic policy**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6NS2bKpYnMmDAAaH_sla5-RaX3QtYtLnssYh76jELeeHUZYL5P5eSEj7epyRBf7SXuAdD_1stBKbazVOgI6ZAzNktsddSF_MPVQ6p2tNd-KqkueqJXrtAI9WokoDtsSnD5X7j1FnBjJIwlNcKp79cA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forbes_non_donors_1&n=1) and provides a cohesive snapshot of the candidate’s **approach to economic reform and how it “draws on ideas from across the political spectrum.”** **Bernick says:**
> “His plan has been termed **‘working class capitalism’ or ‘populist capitalism,’** but whatever term is used, **Kennedy challenges the mainstream Democratic narrative** , in a way that no other campaign is doing. Kennedy comes back to this theme often in his talks ... **wages in working-class jobs have declined steadily** compared to knowledge economy jobs since the late 1970s. This is so, even though these **working-class jobs** — truck driver, certified nurse assistant in long-term care facilities, non-union construction worker, retail clerk, and hundreds of other blue-collar occupations — are the ones in the American economy **providing goods and services valued by others**. **America must find a way back to an economy in which these workers are not one paycheck away from economic despair.** “Kennedy also emphasizes the **rebuilding of the small business economy** ...”
In his final assessment, Bernick contends that **“Kennedy’s ideas are worth following.”** **Please help us get RFK, Jr.’s message of economic hope out to everyone.** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forbes_non_donors_1&n=2 "Give $25->") [Give $25->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forbes_non_donors_1&n=2)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My mom, my community, my Marines, and you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I won’t win this campaign without you behind me.
#

Hey Peter, it's Ruben.
I never would’ve gotten here on my own.
I had help every step of the way.
Whether it was my mom putting a roof over our heads as a struggling single mother.
Or the teachers, the librarians, the friends and members of my community who helped me get into college.
Or the Marines who watched my back in Iraq.
Or you, Peter. I won’t win this campaign without you behind me.
We need lots and lots of people like you to win in Arizona.
Lots of people making calls, knocking doors, or chipping in. And that’s why I’m reaching out.
I need you to send over your first $10 donation.
I know $10 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can win a Senate race, but with thousands of others joining you, it adds up fast. Trust me.
[**So if you’re ready to win again in Arizona in 2024 and hold control in the Senate, rush that $10 today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2102?c0=ruben-em-aug23.iSUbX1&refcode=em230827-1-f&t=1&akid=1048%2E734936%2EtRDveY)
[RUSH $10](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2102?c0=ruben-em-aug23.iSUbX1&refcode=em230827-1-f&t=2&akid=1048%2E734936%2EtRDveY)
Or, if you’re able and willing, feel free to send over a bigger donation.
[RUSH MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230827-1-f&t=3&akid=1048%2E734936%2EtRDveY)
And if now isn’t the right time, that’s okay. Just reading this email helps us reach more people who can chip in.
Thanks a lot, Peter.
-Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: You’re the backbone of our work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Every contribution, and every grassroots supporter counts. | | |
---
Peter, We wanted to give you more insight into our grassroots campaign, and why supporters like you are the backbone of our work. Our team is made up of hundreds of thousands of supporters like you, chipping in a few dollars here and there, because you believe in what President Biden and Vice President Harris are doing to make our country better. **As we work to rebuild America’s infrastructure, protect our planet, and defend our fundamental rights -- we're lucky to have you in this fight, Peter.** Here’s the deal, though: Trump, DeSantis, and the rest of the MAGA extremists trying to become the Republican nominee have been raising millions of dollars for their campaigns, and we can’t just keep up with them _\-- we must outraise them._ Every contribution, and every grassroots supporter, counts. It’s going to take the full strength of this grassroots team behind us to secure Biden-Harris another victory in 2024. **** **[**With that in mind, we wanted to let you know that we have our August fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days, and we'd appreciate your help in getting us to our goal. clean_body: Every contribution, and every grassroots supporter counts. | | | Peter, We wanted to give you more insight into our grassroots campaign, and why supporters like you are the backbone of our work. Our team is made up of hundreds of thousands of supporters like you, chipping in a few dollars here and there, because you believe in what President Biden and Vice President Harris are doing to make our country better. As we work to rebuild America’s infrastructure, protect our planet, and defend our fundamental rights -- we're lucky to have you in this fight, Peter. Here’s the deal, though: Trump, DeSantis, and the rest of the MAGA extremists trying to become the Republican nominee have been raising millions of dollars for their campaigns, and we can’t just keep up with them \-- we must outraise them. Every contribution, and every grassroots supporter, counts. It’s going to take the full strength of this grassroots team behind us to secure Biden-Harris another victory in 2024. ** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and for being a part of this team. You're the reason we're here. \--Team Biden-Harris

name: Jon Tester
subject: My opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can't beat who I am!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I'll be honest, folks—

Fundraising is one of the worst parts of this job, **but just a few moments from now I’ll have to ask you to make a donation.**

Give me a chance to explain: I’m not asking because I like it. I do it because national Republicans and out-of-state super PACs are pledging to spend outrageous amounts of money to attack my character and **the only chance we have to respond is by collecting grassroots donations from a whole lot of people.**

_Folks, my opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am._

I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home.

**Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us.** That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me.

**But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history.**

**[So with all eyes on our race, I have to ask, can I count on you to make a split donation between my campaign and the DSCC right now to help us reach our midnight fundraising goals and defend the Senate? This is important. I need your help.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230827-JonTester-TesterTandemGrassroots-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230827-JonTester-TesterTandemGrassroots-Pros-sl1&akid=11764%2E9716520%2E__wAu_)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jon Tester and the DSCC.

Jon

Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us. That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me. But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jon Tester and the DSCC. | | | | | Thanks for everything you do. We’ve built a great team that relies on grassroots donations to keep us in the fight. Your support really makes a huge difference. I hope you know that. All my best, Jon Jon Tester U.S. Senator, Montana Jon Tester, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, is running for reelection in Montana to continue fighting for working families, veterans, and ordinary folks across the country. | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Kirsten
subject: little moments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68742041/424002202/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q2MjIwMzUtZTY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Keetv1cvE7Tf4Tv9JDewcvsTVTSoxHTWoaVZEez4nEs=)
---
Peter, my end-of-month deadline is just a few away, and I'm still $4,196 short. Please, will you give me just 30 seconds to explain why this deadline is so important and what exactly your $10 donation would mean? I first ran for office in a deep-red district in upstate New York. When we flipped that seat blue against all the odds, I learned a fundamental truth about politics that has guided me ever since: **_Campaigns are won one voter, and one donation, at a time._** At the end of the day, photoshoots and consultants don't win elections. Votes do. And all the ways that we win those votes is what really matters — a mailer that offers solutions for the issues an undecided voter really cares about, a five-minute long phone call from a volunteer, a text that helps a busy mom vote by mail or a TV ad that reaches the right house at the right time. **_All those little moments add up to victory on Election Day._** Building the resources to power that kind of campaign happens one grassroots donation at a time, too. If you make a donation to help us hit our mid-month deadline tonight, you can give us the resources to knock on one more door, send another batch of GOTV texts or put up one more yard sign. And, if enough people like you chip in, we'll hit our critical end-of-quarter goal. We'll be one step closer to having the grassroots resources it's going to take to win this campaign. New York Republicans just had their best election in decades, and with control of the Senate on the line in 2024, every single vote, every single donation and every single grassroots goal will make all the difference for my campaign. _[**That's why I'm personally asking: Please, if you have anything to spare, will you invest in this people-powered campaign by splitting a donation between HER Time and my campaign? I’m relying on grassroots support from people like you, especially during crucial moments like this one.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68742042/424002204/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q2MjIwMzUtZTY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Keetv1cvE7Tf4Tv9JDewcvsTVTSoxHTWoaVZEez4nEs=)_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68742043/424002205/-2030493197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q2MjIwMzUtZTY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Keetv1cvE7Tf4Tv9JDewcvsTVTSoxHTWoaVZEez4nEs=)

clean_body: | = Peter, my end-of-month deadline is just a few away, and I'm still $4,196 short. Please, will you give me just 30 seconds to explain why this deadline is so important and what exactly your $10 donation would mean? I first ran for office in a deep-red district in upstate New York. When we flipped that seat blue against all the odds, I learned a fundamental truth about politics that has guided me ever since: Campaigns are won one voter, and one donation, at a time. At the end of the day, photoshoots and consultants don't win elections. Votes do. And all the ways that we win those votes is what really matters — a mailer that offers solutions for the issues an undecided voter really cares about, a five-minute long phone call from a volunteer, a text that helps a busy mom vote by mail or a TV ad that reaches the right house at the right time. All those little moments add up to victory on Election Day. Building the resources to power that kind of campaign happens one grassroots donation at a time, too. If you make a donation to help us hit our mid-month deadline tonight, you can give us the resources to knock on one more door, send another batch of GOTV texts or put up one more yard sign. And, if enough people like you chip in, we'll hit our critical end-of-quarter goal. We'll be one step closer to having the grassroots resources it's going to take to win this campaign. New York Republicans just had their best election in decades, and with control of the Senate on the line in 2024, every single vote, every single donation and every single grassroots goal will make all the difference for my campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With gratitude, Kirsten HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: My father was just ARRESTED

body:
They're trying to intimidate the American people...

| | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80cc65b4220b482f84a6ea31e55f34b7&_e=Y9GcFJG-3j0VJvUgkpNmS4eydpUvR_9caEK6A_VCSBAeE5EmCVw4B5ZPhSp1ny9OVA0fF7s0dVPnfosR8pCnxCDTW1e6gLozEip3l8AjWC8L122g_bkH9XfaFA5d6o2g0dsY3ZClD2-FbZaO678YVuxAbmfYOw9D5IFYgA4c5Gj3rXzvW_qLaytPNwQEHXhbpGg08rbLa9ESy8REIGJHd1FqtjK6LG-o6UFMcB0Ab2LV2UQ66U5cIfoLaSk-eiv3RfPnRP1W2rswL--wQIPXxW40psoCaUjsUrSbej28-NaVyqkgqmnjD9sumk77Xz9EhBrpPIdIhBYiTti4B0VnhIHyKGcw1IU_NikTMffLglhXSqPzbrH4qoUr6Md1LC-0YjSLmD-S0eBHq6Im4zowMY0pOSagaw1TDMVBZbaw43c%3D)
---
Friend,
This is truly a sad day for America.
First, Crooked Joe and his accomplices indicted my father as an innocent man _four_ times to try and eliminate their chief political rival.
And now, they've officially ARRESTED him and turned it into a made-for-TV spectacle.
Why? Because they want to ensure that every screen in America today reminds you of what these witch hunts are really all about: _fear. _
The fear that if you call out the broken establishment, cast off the political ruling class, and stand up for the forgotten men and women of our country, then you too could be indicted, arrested, or even imprisoned.
_This is how far they will go to try and**INTIMIDATE** you out of voting for the one candidate who will always put our country - and YOU - first. _
It's truly sickening to see what has become of the freest nation on earth.
But while these witch-hunt crazed radicals believe they're scaring voters away from our movement, the reality is they've only made us that much STRONGER.
They've revealed to the American people the TRUE extent of their Third World tyranny.
_And by this time tomorrow, our movement will be TWICE as strong and more UNITED than ever before!_
**Which is why I want to show my father a list of ALL the patriots who stood by his side while he was being unjustly arrested and made a contribution to SAVE America.**
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly, even just $1_ - to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts and have YOUR NAME added to the list of supporters that I'm going to share with my father.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80cc65b4220b482f84a6ea31e55f34b7&_e=Y9GcFJG-3j0VJvUgkpNmS4eydpUvR_9caEK6A_VCSBAeE5EmCVw4B5ZPhSp1ny9OVA0fF7s0dVPnfosR8pCnxCDTW1e6gLozEip3l8AjWC8L122g_bkH9XfaFA5d6o2g0dsY3ZClD2-FbZaO678YVuxAbmfYOw9D5IFYgA4c5Gj3rXzvW_qLaytPNwQEHXhbpGg08rbLa9ESy8REIGJHd1FqtjK6LG-o6UFMcB0Ab2LV2UQ66U5cIfoLaSk-eiv3pbEO7PtjRTgOH1GDbrjLpyrnViFmW_OxA0og_BJrufHPUPLEAEYAevbIzQdHXH8q4MMKIXq2TJkDxrkCYTX_b37ILI1_U9vYTYS9qPHuO8IbwGM6RxRLuQnInswDPgDti53ujIxijgeSbA6jLpfMBCDSR6PMPNLIYrYI3jN-eEU%3D)**
| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80cc65b4220b482f84a6ea31e55f34b7&_e=Y9GcFJG-3j0VJvUgkpNmS4eydpUvR_9caEK6A_VCSBAeE5EmCVw4B5ZPhSp1ny9OVA0fF7s0dVPnfosR8pCnxCDTW1e6gLozEip3l8AjWC8L122g_bkH9XfaFA5d6o2g0dsY3ZClD2-FbZaO678YVuxAbmfYOw9D5IFYgA4c5Gj3rXzvW_qLaytPNwQEHXhbpGg08rbLa9ESy8REIGJHd1FqtjK6LG-o6UFMcB0Ab2LV2UQ66U5cIfoLaSk-eiv3wBT2x2ThO_G1JFxwjrILrT3oT2rBdTR7uweR_w2krBcnzQF7S8E-GIPe0Xxms1YaQx_Bh2-1G5tO2a0Faio_uDwb79IEN_jL8A7u199Zx9uQxl_w8aTe5vZbGMahZiHKsigz_TfcPaYJMT9t9atGWOJlHjRZOAX1N35-65NOZwI%3D)

Thank you for all your support,
| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80cc65b4220b482f84a6ea31e55f34b7&_e=Y9GcFJG-3j0VJvUgkpNmS4eydpUvR_9caEK6A_VCSBAeE5EmCVw4B5ZPhSp1ny9OVA0fF7s0dVPnfosR8pCnxCDTW1e6gLozEip3l8AjWC8L122g_bkH9XfaFA5d6o2g0dsY3ZClD2-FbZaO678YVuxAbmfYOw9D5IFYgA4c5Gj3rXzvW_qLaytPNwQEHXhbpGg08rbLa9ESy8REIGJHd1FqtjK6LG-o6UFMcB0Ab2LV2UQ66U5cIfoLaSk-eiv3V92DBAn_S9E8k2en7SVRf3jdmKy5RzK0T2bz2Y34ovlSsNXim_XMkWvkbPHCDB6DrROhhkTb5n2ObSonolQbeYZE9y5lmFjJAJZfhsahyMYJca-v7OOXR38jcTlzTrMyODFy7G1kG44dNkOO7Jb-zmyl2WZFyI4AKcJhtUEXjRg%3D)

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8cxb6NItbQRo6lZH7Mqdu5GxrGMEdV5_CNTZq7DwGoAT8c1enU1dhCDBrbG-K8dRgT5U3Hk6QIjNxT-tQDeHkgqZpPdd-DtzLRt633Zi9y7Myq2U5Gymno5ujS9BI82h2B43zFWCkXgcIAVI4Q12LLCvy36leGvP0nm9nazTTFr3VrxQCHq1o7JCyqUE9Ilc38wNOUAjpYYUFbq5OQU53oUfVu248ldGY66WaRlcA7kb43wH4XpW6l5gL0MaPQMUcSgym5oD7pgU8teIzQiS_q5vgTho09vg7ptGtd-A0bnLgR7avfUsBquZpakwC5mkDi9BlxCjb2h7ViN9aFX_mXs/3z3/zcOJ6SoEQ0STK--XHTxvqw/h0/jcCgoh2fT21EyGFU8XU-maI4rlUx0HdGwRTOpaI84ZA) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0OOcEhzoHO8-Ar0PwM1TJqV5fuV9kneanK2-M-sz995zU3GtFYjEBsTKLEtAbPsmCqlEp-OFdz-1_jYQ7yDvlRLjP6vr5KzpJL_9o72m3hinRzvZab4BUSUbKlaIa5vC9jZXDzRlCj1Tw0VbTG9vwv6jvJvBWBUcDPKzUJTEzqLfpfKY2ltgWozGJ1iDxZpcYgDpUC6kgwTZ0r9RpI4j1hPNtD59w8ecfoLA41HyX7_mgN0Rck-OIrzMbv2b_O9c8fEhHUwk721m-ODmHK8LdZ40N_-JwNSBVheZiRhKVUZC024hKnZjtNaqvG_JAjTjcF7pZyIRGkQA6oyl2NdEyGA4fJ7m03dZI-ToafId91tA76_efLWiM69griudOdGjP/3z3/zcOJ6SoEQ0STK--XHTxvqw/h1/7B9RKI9rllNoFgLrG4Fr1XpnujF5birM3r0j9dGknwA) Peter,

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: **I am officially launching my campaign for the US Senate.** [_**Before I get into the details, can you chip in $10, split with The Collective PAC, to become a Founding Donor of my Senate campaign? It’s going to take a huge team of grassroots supporters to make me the first Black woman to represent Delaware in the Senate, so please chip in:**_](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0OOcEhzoHO8-Ar0PwM1TJqV5fuV9kneanK2-M-sz995zU3GtFYjEBsTKLEtAbPsmCqlEp-OFdz-1_jYQ7yDvlRLjP6vr5KzpJL_9o72m3hinRzvZab4BUSUbKlaIa5vC9MbdvzcjO7MPiAPmZtU1jFNCpPe7FG9gv4aFGpecwj6EGANzacr_k__ydXNY6x0nQ26AatwWgcE1800hjE_egNCh09j1Y6FZGPtGOI7ZIG5N44I-SB01Fk023QjHES1ch4DAjBRuOwW5hmvC6t4hHdmCdAANoNSg8ucokjb0-z1kCydhy79QVaaYVOzcmbcHQTz6jd2eIKHMMBGWm01FvSVXTcJpt08o2CJx1TBpS_RaND9zUkRJkkqsYGEzCFse6/3z3/zcOJ6SoEQ0STK--XHTxvqw/h2/ZCA0hiLGNboVhi7q7M_b5RBOSPXJL-YA4Z_Q1qwCLL8) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0OOcEhzoHO8-Ar0PwM1TJqV5fuV9kneanK2-M-sz995zU3GtFYjEBsTKLEtAbPsmCqlEp-OFdz-1_jYQ7yDvlRLjP6vr5KzpJL_9o72m3hinRzvZab4BUSUbKlaIa5vC9bWrs92FiFtunQ99q_5c4GrkgQxQyDEU1B9EXTesvbrjoRYkyrKwaDKpgrg8f2zrNnUL4xXVUX-roSK-WWU77Ft4gLo_WRB40RS_1MdW2BEd0EFmwEg3yG5ozbhO6RyXvasRsrU5j4fLj7Ws_xFfCnDKyUtP4Qfb0DjxnGnwpLKaeZueQN_Gfxgi6jB-ijfhrUjmFfigS71oNPpdYOx2NyqnsQOMejUOqwfbrpOb1kp_7gPXrN_fC7rD7KgArvcmz/3z3/zcOJ6SoEQ0STK--XHTxvqw/h3/8ov2m0wILw-8fBxoOE-GcsF-GM-ZSXHnoPPJbLrlMAM) When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote.

Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go.

The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

[_**My team and I have set a goal to earn the support of 30,000 Founding Donors, and we’re counting on generous donors like you to help get there. Can you rush anything right now to my campaign so we can get the ball rolling on the race of a lifetime?**_](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0OOcEhzoHO8-Ar0PwM1TJqV5fuV9kneanK2-M-sz995zU3GtFYjEBsTKLEtAbPsmCqlEp-OFdz-1_jYQ7yDvlRLjP6vr5KzpJL_9o72m3hinRzvZab4BUSUbKlaIa5vC9ysQLu2SJphCQ0doQca2XO_Hx2j-Xna9uAxkSle90d8gnRakkFWbfOguUsaeVSlZWq-EkpHBbBymXSqy6-ty_H3ieVssDL-tVTclaFRpDfEnRGPGT3FyIB0zMidGZoZeEfRuRkAqG06SBapqmr6Wm07GoVCGCdLDAxvigYrB4XVg_bssj5YlKHb_lIygeawzcjoSZTB1KL3xuuLst7Np0itfW17f8d3DKCE26DpJDng-54WIXWYmJYkiw1v2HK7sP/3z3/zcOJ6SoEQ0STK--XHTxvqw/h4/1UsVFkYiG4OjXBtFJ6fSF42qaDEiiptUCEtlazGTUFc) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0OOcEhzoHO8-Ar0PwM1TJqV5fuV9kneanK2-M-sz995zU3GtFYjEBsTKLEtAbPsmCqlEp-OFdz-1_jYQ7yDvlRLjP6vr5KzpJL_9o72m3hinRzvZab4BUSUbKlaIa5vC94sf_ErR7L0czTEv0VG0N2isJd4ashViYcJVd8v_aU7_k8CLgt_KLTjowoLbyommAjVu2HX3GQv8nfdZDwE7fZxo5d50LAKdWY6i_ZABwqjKWUF8v0YzBh60gA41vTfs_qL0QwfMV1FPMFCZpzepwbUm66T-tXZ3rf773yJvYzTd75QDP4Eyh8F8qd2J4NQHCLWLcBmCHbMOXw-pYO3vvrOt3in5v4xi9lGjGfZAMzh0YufBBpNXBkksxjGpBDO3K/3z3/zcOJ6SoEQ0STK--XHTxvqw/h5/juorgYWV7p8rsUeiFMYvjQq84HB5-0b2We1JdEGo5Rw) I am all in for Delaware, Peter. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I am officially launching my campaign for the US Senate. When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote. Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go. The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. I am all in for Delaware, Peter. I’ve never been more ready to continue making history as a United States Senator. Lisa Blunt Rochester | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Lucas K.
subject: I want to fundamentally change who has power in our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Here’s what that means to me:
#
Peter — I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat to defeat Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country. Here’s what that means to me:
**Standing up for working families:** Workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds like Josh Hawley calling the shots in our country. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country.
**Investing in our communities:** DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars. Now, it’s time to invest in the workers and communities that make our country strong so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and cities, and finally start making stuff in America again.
**Putting people in charge of their own lives:** Politicians like Josh Hawley have spent years using their power to control our lives. I’m committed to overturning the filibuster so we can protect abortion access in all 50 states — and finally give people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities.
**Holding our politicians accountable:** Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the same massive corporations that have spent decades stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and abolish ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns — and it’s why I’m holding myself and my campaign to that same standard.
**I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there.[So Peter, will you make your first donation of $10 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35853?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35854?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35854?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35854?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35854?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35854?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35854?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35853?refcode=em20230827-3639&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3639%2E614464%2E4J8Iyw)

Thanks for helping us get it done,

name: Team Pramila
subject: Support the WISE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week, Pramila introduced the Working for Immigrant Safety and Empowerment (WISE) Act to protect immigrant survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender-based violence.
#
Peter, we need to do more to protect immigrants in our country.
Immigrant women are significantly more likely to suffer domestic violence, nearly three times the national average. It’s crucial that we do everything we can to ensure survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender based violence are protected.
That’s why, last week, Pramila introduced the Working for Immigrant Safety and Empowerment (WISE) Act to protect immigrant survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender-based violence.
As a progressive movement, **it is our duty and moral obligation to keep our communities safe and protect our neighbors, no matter their race, ethnicity, citizenship status, or background.[If you stand with Pramila and our movement, please add your name to our petition to urge Congress to pass the WISE Act and protect immigrant survivors.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-WISE-act/?source=em20230827-2854&t=1&akid=2854%2E420207%2EHyv8QS)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-WISE-act/?source=em20230827-2854&t=2&akid=2854%2E420207%2EHyv8QS)**
Immigrant women and children are particularly vulnerable to domestic violence, and the rate of abuse against immigrant women is nearly 49 percent, nearly three times the national average. And they are less likely to report these instances due to fear of deportation.
The WISE Act would ensure that immigrants have access to protections intended by the bipartisan Violence Against Women Act (VAWA), the Trafficking Victim Protection Act (TVPA), and other federal and state laws. **And most importantly, this bill will ensure survivors pursuing relief are not detained or deported before their applications are fully adjudicated.**
Victims of violence should be able to receive justice, no matter what. **[Add your name to stand with Pramila and our progressive movement as we fight to ensure all immigrants have the federal and state protections they need to feel and be safe.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-WISE-act/?source=em20230827-2854&t=3&akid=2854%2E420207%2EHyv8QS)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230827-2854-footer&t=4&refcode2=2854_420207_Hyv8QS&akid=2854%2E420207%2EHyv8QS)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

That’s why, last week, Pramila introduced the Working for Immigrant Safety and Empowerment (WISE) Act to protect immigrant survivors of domestic violence, human trafficking, and gender-based violence.
