The WISE Act would ensure that immigrants have access to protections intended by the bipartisan Violence Against Women Act (VAWA), the Trafficking Victim Protection Act (TVPA), and other federal and state laws. And most importantly, this bill will ensure survivors pursuing relief are not detained or deported before their applications are fully adjudicated. Victims of violence should be able to receive justice, no matter what. Together, Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Friend,

The race for control of the House will be tight, and the stakes could not be higher.

With recent Supreme Court decisions, leading election experts are saying the race for the House is a toss-up. **_In the last month alone, more than five races have critically shifted–we only need five seats to take the majority, which puts momentum on our side._**

No matter what happens, Marcy Kaptur will be in a toss-up race against a Kevin McCarthy-backed opponent, and that’s not changing. Holding this seat is critical to gaining a Democratic majority and delivering on the issues that matter most to our community. We must be prepared.

Peter, it's been over a year since the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ – stripping away reproductive freedom from millions of Americans.
In the time since, we've seen one disastrous decision after another. This ultraconservative majority – stacked with justices appointed by Donald Trump – has handed down rulings that attack LGBTQ+ rights, affirmative action, student loan forgiveness, and so much more.
**This much is clear: The direction of the current Supreme Court is far from the will of the American people.**
In this urgent moment, our mission to get more fierce Democratic women in office who will defend our fundamental rights and safeguard the future of our democracy is as important as ever. That’s why we launched our Gavel In training this year – to train jurists who want to serve in judgeships to run successful and strategic political campaigns. But it's going to take all of us fighting together, side by side.
**That's why we're counting on 53 more Emerge community members – including you – to take a stand alongside us today. So please, before our live poll closes at midnight, tell us: **
**Do you approve of the current Supreme Court?**

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpe8ntvvhk8ppcfjbrf0qcl0p1kq7epodinmeoa8_rp22sh2s8i66p76chhm4o76c1h2bs)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohfcrfk9qoh6vscmqov2rlv1p37f3l7791tn96g_rp22sh2s8i66p76chhm4o76c1h2bs)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhupamj4hgt0qhg6trt4gh12jhl7m4hj2u4pumgg_rp22sh2s8i66p76chhm4o76c1h2bs)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvjjqbns9r384nqt605am8260clcmn481jifskno_rp22sh2s8i66p76chhm4o76c1h2bs)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvpooshkg4oqcgk1irbn947298givg4546d6v49o_rp22sh2s8i66p76chhm4o76c1h2bs)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---

I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:

Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt28aeqfafvt21rf7401lgsicd0lmf69995s0n98_rp22sh2s8i66p76chhm4o76c1h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: Don’t let Trump delay his trials. Urge the judges to hold them as soon as possible
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don’t let Trump delay his trials. Urge the judges to hold them as soon as possible >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2354f1b3-71d7-4edc-a19a-89e89ff0f874/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c23bd40-9695-47a0-938d-3e64cbb9fc2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump and his attorneys have gotten even more absurd with their attempts to delay his multiple trials. **Now they are pushing to move them to 2026 or even later.** [**Don't let Trump delay his trials. Urge the judges to hold them as soon as possible.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8079f2e9-55ca-4eb6-b048-eb4061b052fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump's strategy is clear — delay justice until he can win the presidency and pardon himself, or even just ignore the courts altogether. Trump needs to be punished for his crimes, and he needs to go to jail as soon as possible. America can't afford to sit back waiting and watching while Trump becomes a dictator. **Sign the petition, and urge the judges in the various cases to recognize the threat, and move as quickly as possible.** [**Don't let Trump delay his trials. Urge the judges to hold them as soon as possible.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69d3c351-c5a2-4e2f-8c3c-6d43f6a3ab1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Kids like me didn’t make it to Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Growing up, I never expected to be a member of Congress. It had never happened for a kid with a story like mine.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=473%2E791427%2ELwnpQ-)

Friends,
Growing up, I never expected to be a member of Congress. It had never happened for a kid with a story like mine.
When I was just a young child, my family escaped the Somali Civil War and took sanctuary in a Kenyan refugee camp for four years.
We didn't always have enough food or running water, but we did always hold out hope that one day we'd be able to start a new life in the United States. And we did — right here in Minneapolis.
My community here taught me that we look out for one another. We work hard for a fair wage, and our shared success allows all of us to thrive. And we do our part to leave the world better than we found it.
So when the opportunity came to serve the people who took my family in and gave us a home here, I stepped up and ran for Congress.
I never imagined that I would become the first African-born member of Congress, the first woman of color to represent Minnesota in Congress, or that tens of thousands of people across America would be with me along the way.
If you told me when I first arrived in Minneapolis that this is how life would unfold, I wouldn’t have believed you.
But it always comes back to community for me. Everything we've accomplished has only ever been possible because we’ve done it together. I am incredibly grateful for the support from people like you.
But our work is far from over. If we're going to continue building progressive power and fighting for policies and ideas that put working people first, it's going to take every single one of us. So I have to ask:
**[Please consider making a contribution of any amount to our campaign ahead of our August fundraising deadline. It will take all of us doing our part to win the fights ahead.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230827-1-t1&t=2&akid=473%2E791427%2ELwnpQ-)**

Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating.

Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear.

**Their name-calling won't stop me.**

_**[Will you stand with me, Fellow American?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=907ed1aae40c40c88550a236dd082101&_e=UofNbuqwd8nwN3PoO0xU7NvyJuxiswtB9cGcR8zbjyn9ge0vFQFpnOUMvPFoZpA1mAWW9fj_y_sfeBYGURBzXjxImWQq32Ctw8OJl93eL1--FoqW33alEv2Yv8jgAc1v8WF6Y3ADLtkPnfgm8EO2nlSEsckaj959YNiC603eyCrFi0Ysn6gZSppeMl8sL-IrU2A7xZzlMzuZ2v_82lJnznDXW-YozCJ4MgippMMjaQ0Y6Uwtmr1QdZwDQ3IxFspyaUYwUKWcFL0GtsFrc09CWoEJclbzKOi8G9XhuZwaQ6oOeiER_7c0ePvuTrP4Ln2OwrZhVqm6_ul2Z9dVJq6UsQp2F4gNf5s_ED7gaIfpb1H44994i62f9a2zeBv5cfScOCyFQTcfcfdnjXh_yjxMpD4buseAeD72J_80oCCVRcMm6HEw1YUjA5a0dvFrbtAm)**_

Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things:
* Pro-war in Ukraine
* Fine with political opponents getting arrested
* Anti-free speech
* Bought & paid for by Super PACs
* Pretends to be anti-establishment

It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me.

I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Now we must prepare for the NEXT GOP debate, but I need your help to once again secure a center spot on stage. -- Vivek Sent from my iPhone From: Vivek Ramaswamy Date: Thursday, August 10, 2023 Subject: This is laughable. Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating. Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear. Their name-calling won't stop me. Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things: Pro-war in Ukraine Fine with political opponents getting arrested Anti-free speech Bought & paid for by Super PACs Pretends to be anti-establishment It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me. I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage. | '&amount=5.00 | | '&amount=10.00 ---|---|--- '&amount=24.00 | | '&amount=50.00 Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy ' GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to help elect state Democrats now. **By chipping in _today,_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. | |

Hi Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track.

But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board.

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af2915a544444f038cbaad6b101f1642&_e=6Vq7jqtqKVdYk5FjZmaOW0FWSb8m28Vcpz4GcMrKiiKg1gcMVq2YGnhFEg9cZKqq3s9uR0YJi8DED7NMTuu1J9ESns12qFgNk9AJ_-rz_8Pp72i6eBAgG4BuF4YFsjgKrnYNv00ozbromI6j6q1LPMFRzdorfmd7B74pxz38SABicjrYUXsuVjk4r44iKxBDxM0Xgvt4WNf81myOQi7tSwYeQd-DZeb22efbg_TnXRrtRa7ZrFDIdnPL9hknWjfleOVnElGOewC1b3L_JiJmhpG54orjzY2iyy08mXSaylx33MBUsS2rpl4XdXMW3y3vw8uTJPwJdWQlBK5VrbLzbz34OQExEbtwe-P09FUlkgCW1HG84Sktby--H7PfprWSIqjmFOjWWtciWWeeevlUB9dN_xM6IgvjoU0dhsU4o4v1QccmH8fekWG6CrpmiVd3VK4cc6O2dHhS1Yv5kRSFDIFRKxu6oClYgq3Qhk0I_G57OuNNlMmA-LmptQJVtgJnV5hlVebxDm2uPVMQxy6MaLzZeNCL_XQLamv8vzMxqj8sMok6bE6m8IRt_X4n1w-fIevdDnnulOoP9S7LoBxNvLsmFwyJkMs0eF1zpzLxkaHFxqLzQi0oCCu8EdeUI1g81DE0-KhRFfPFo8zYoLo1CQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, If you watched the debate, you know why I'm running for president and the solutions I have to offer to get our country back on track. But, whether you've been with me from the start or this is the first time you're hearing about me, I couldn't be more grateful to have you on board. With the first debate kicking this election into high gear, I think it's important to take a few minutes to introduce myself and talk about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President over six months ago because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today in support of my fight to save America? | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

We’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $8,000 by the end of the month, and we hope you’ll pitch in to help!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68747338/424019476/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.27_b1_maco08cm_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTg2MDVlZS1mMTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwIFoskJhY-6ij-TTZHa6tRlJwMc2K6u-ULlXz9MvS0=)**

This campaign operates in a unique way because Yadira Caraveo isn’t another career politician in Congress. She is the product of working-class, 1st generation immigrants, and a pediatrician in Adams County. She ran for office because she knew it was the best way to advocate for her patients unable to afford quality health care.

**Thanks to support from people like you, we were able to defy the odds and elect Yadira Caraveo to Colorado’s 8th District by just 1,632 votes.** _Now, she’s providing true representation for working-class families and pushing for bold change in Congress._

Our next step is to flip the House in 2024. Colorado’s 8th District will be one of the closest contests in the entire country - so we need to double down on what we achieved in 2022.

**[As a grassroots funded campaign, we can’t do that important work without you. So Peter, would you pitch in any amount you’re able to give to help our campaign meet our $8,000 end of month goal? subject: Re: One year of the congressional Mamas’ Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvWAX8QBFFVISYBquHiM56cfzN1mkoKMg9ZsSFNwyedIIGci1GDfjvThLJVXxxAvGPmvmZ_KWrrqMJKeOGJm8ZMwYPB7gw9fEZTS-aU8M-kzkB90aOVQ5sFXPeSCnDsPkmoq53ZhZAQSxYUQuNIvNxEsVBaA0I9Q0Tm7KBojJAzlkLXtAWC1JzF4d0aa3f_5Fb/3z3/aUp-iGrxSzSIq9z07ceXoQ/h0/X5fzPgVO9pCDBXIil_YdJPIDik99Lynr86OEjtIsVYE)
---
Friend, I founded the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus a year ago. We’re centering mothers of color in the policies we champion in Congress, from reducing poverty and closing the racial and gender wealth gaps, to ensuring a national paid family and medical leave program, to investing in affordable childcare, to establishing healthcare equity and housing for all. We’ve built power in Congress this past year, and we have many efforts in store for the year to come because our communities urgently need support. **Our social safety net has left too many families behind, and the racism in our country’s institutions has further failed families of color.** The costs of raising a child in our country are among the highest in the world, and the U.S. is also one of the only industrialized countries that does not offer a single day of paid family or medical leave. So the Mamas’ Caucus is committed to making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. **Together, we’re building a long-overdue social safety net for our nation’s working-class families and children.** [**Could you chip in $5, $25, $50 or more to join me in the fight for working-class families across our country?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlIoCC0XFlxQeggDoKPTUl-neo_XzrFC5-uT4M1CDGT-c8YRMA9eYoc_4oCM44qaYWheMaT3AVtqNso0P_VPman0BuOu3LyWDQgn4S2t1_sXiSZPH9ZOImVGRLdfou3C0RVNxge4hbRnH-33D6aOZbZnzE8AavnzVDuPD3ddi84sc07LDOpPSgDQMpnGxY-FmAVzpvozCS-eOnzoNT8i3JcPBPl0e1mgZpfzKyF0JrjBm3qTTasPSawChzCYhu9k8YKMMcCTskxcj-AxV32s734ij52wrO1MMv6_-7E9IEe5YU8mIac9VYBSHsmbQvX6o1U7NCWrm58EDPi1GTge-MCKDbD3zv1qT4rnxM5RIP4QRNzkeJWnUVkgxbBt1g4lg/3z3/aUp-iGrxSzSIq9z07ceXoQ/h1/h6KDjmtPlCdV8qJoMuVTM7hio4Eqw2XIbDwOfPqFQeY) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlIoCC0XFlxQeggDoKPTUl-neo_XzrFC5-uT4M1CDGT-AEGStLEj7kD_Mk-s8OsEJbPs8yfMG8Fp_nj3wEdKV0KPB0ybimWRdglcb27-azdkw8R-_K3fuPU65Irc6fK9khFDhSpk3B8K6fDxtsvp3iej-LJpkX75tbjOxQX631Q5YWMKQpHyqweolRIyKNIeIm4DqsEHRmNRyfcsmCyWLfrp5U7Tos74XQLRPQE4dl_3goOIWOwpEQrfSQLkeYJywEaFjA1BGk05THVtAMf54cTtDfjubxr7VWCBwcFwKhmP1EymKvITp9VCICl3jiZWxAsMJ7-P3ImAfHm5Dgk5VKahbNNMe7xpcPNEF23QjulHXH6snzYDGoE2jp9MCo1MPrlIJBToTrO5EqYA54yC0y0FjlI5uUNwAK2TBVZAi4zQ/3z3/aUp-iGrxSzSIq9z07ceXoQ/h2/BmzHyUSUnJTfJRqz6Vk7JpfGF8p3vxFkQ6jjghXsJzY)

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Aug 26, 2023
Subject: One year of the congressional Mamas’ Caucus
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
We just celebrated the one-year anniversary of the congressional Mamas’ Caucus, which I founded to advocate for mothers of color and working families. We’re making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made.
**We’re fighting for equal pay, because moms make just 62 cents for every dollar dads make.** After having a child, we often face bias, career interruptions, and lower pay—the “motherhood penalty.”
Due to systemic racism, Black and brown moms earn even less money to provide for their families, and Black women are also in the midst of a maternal health crisis.
**We’re fighting to close these racial and gender wealth gaps and to secure a national paid leave program, high-quality childcare and early education programs that pay providers a living wage, and reproductive justice.**
We’re also advocating for policies to reduce poverty, including my bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would provide families with a $428/month payment per child, cutting deep child poverty by over 93%.
**The cost of raising a child in our country is among the highest in the world, which is why the Mamas’ Caucus is fighting for the bold and needed changes that working-class families and families of color deserve.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or more so we can ensure that working-class families have the resources they need to thrive?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlIoCC0XFlxQeggDoKPTUl-neo_XzrFC5-uT4M1CDGT-c8YRMA9eYoc_4oCM44qaZSkMKCz19ZiuE4ENqEzq1AGyKhNacAFmwQZGF2MBrfeD49XterpbqPGkf-AIHTr7_oGWqEa20Ae0fHKz9mGeN0qvNX1PwT-fpeQVxnbzQ3gRRQOBLWzwoD5ooXWEXd4eMCsTl6w1pgEHIsU8iEqcAb0NcaY1LDbXoajO3gzvaI94-a99ITJdo3Ur_eQewVsIdfHkhefVveUq3hSIEPAw5tapNmLT0iOE7AKdt5djjAGl5Ew0tRAIjLRxcgrYYkojT8XNMSpe3QPAZCsHms3kGKnQCnCbQ2aYy5Gda2OAUbS2IL5W9tss4AfB67zC18s7k/3z3/aUp-iGrxSzSIq9z07ceXoQ/h8/N2xdKAQMLKZTQlEEPuNQ0RylANi40OIN0dLZz6XzyRI)

clean_body: Making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. | | | Friend, I founded the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus a year ago. We’re centering mothers of color in the policies we champion in Congress, from reducing poverty and closing the racial and gender wealth gaps, to ensuring a national paid family and medical leave program, to investing in affordable childcare, to establishing healthcare equity and housing for all. We’ve built power in Congress this past year, and we have many efforts in store for the year to come because our communities urgently need support. Our social safety net has left too many families behind, and the racism in our country’s institutions has further failed families of color. The costs of raising a child in our country are among the highest in the world, and the U.S. is also one of the only industrialized countries that does not offer a single day of paid family or medical leave. So the Mamas’ Caucus is committed to making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. Together, we’re building a long-overdue social safety net for our nation’s working-class families and children. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I’m committed to making the transformative changes that families of color and working-class families deserve. Thank you so much for joining me in this fight. We’re making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. We’re fighting for equal pay, because moms make just 62 cents for every dollar dads make. After having a child, we often face bias, career interruptions, and lower pay—the “motherhood penalty.” Due to systemic racism, Black and brown moms earn even less money to provide for their families, and Black women are also in the midst of a maternal health crisis. We’re fighting to close these racial and gender wealth gaps and to secure a national paid leave program, high-quality childcare and early education programs that pay providers a living wage, and reproductive justice. We’re also advocating for policies to reduce poverty, including my bill, the End Child Poverty Act , which would provide families with a $428/month payment per child, cutting deep child poverty by over 93%. The cost of raising a child in our country is among the highest in the world, which is why the Mamas’ Caucus is fighting for the bold and needed changes that working-class families and families of color deserve. name: Colin Allred
subject: Help me defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Will you help me win in Texas??
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21602?t=6&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M) Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to help reach my ambitious goal of $500,000?**[**Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21603?t=8&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ron Be Gone and Colin Allred will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21610?t=15&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21611?t=16&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21612?t=17&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**We need to raise $4,000 by MIDNIGHT to fund our crucial work. Will you chip in $1, $3, or anything you can afford today? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21603?t=19&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

_Colin Allred_
[DONATE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21603?t=21&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M)
---

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1964%2E564421%2EsH-34M).**

name: Team DeSantis
subject: We want to earn your support, and we want this on your car!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=86b3523ec99a0e1f157365d57d370c27b53e0bec19edceedfc282e968e64eb0946af8590b55e91492d2acf83924499b9bcc19432a05edc338430bc0df979f322c36d87119e0d2727400784b62f276869

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af3aa7513b837fc8abb890498f5bec92b5e0c03c9fcf6f457baeefd4c7aad0183dfbc8956158cf12c6922f1e022d8c02086143d9fb6a946b05527b565e56ac5f

Peter,

We want to earn your support for Team DeSantis. Why?

Because we’re fighting for our Great American Comeback, and we can’t win without you.

Our Great American Comeback is simple:

-

Gov. DeSantis will rebuild the economy because people across this country are hurting due to rampant inflation, irresponsible government spending, and the prioritization of corporations and elites over people just trying to make ends meet. He will ensure the American Dream is back within everyone's reach.

-

Gov. DeSantis will stop the invasion at our southern border, build the wall, declare war on the Mexican drug cartels, and stop the flow of fentanyl and human trafficking into our country.

-

Gov. DeSantis will prevent China from spying on our citizens and stealing our technology, and he will revitalize domestic energy production so that America can provide for itself.

-

Gov. DeSantis will restore sanity to our country by getting woke ideology out of our schools, our military, and our culture.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af3aa7513b837fc8abb890498f5bec92b5e0c03c9fcf6f457baeefd4c7aad0183dfbc8956158cf12c6922f1e022d8c02086143d9fb6a946b05527b565e56ac5f
DONATE TO OUR TEAM

Any size donation to our team makes an incredible impact. To make sure you know how much that means to our team, we want to send you a free bumper sticker as our first thank-you gift!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af3aa7513b837fc8abb890498f5bec92b5e0c03c9fcf6f457baeefd4c7aad0183dfbc8956158cf12c6922f1e022d8c02086143d9fb6a946b05527b565e56ac5f

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af3aa7513b837fc8abb890498f5bec92b5e0c03c9fcf6f457baeefd4c7aad0183dfbc8956158cf12c6922f1e022d8c02086143d9fb6a946b05527b565e56ac5f
DONATE $5 HERE: YOUR BUMPER STICKER WILL BE ON THE WAY!

We know Joe Biden's economy has made things tough. That's why we wanted to make sure you knew that you don't need to donate anything more than $5 to show your support for Ron DeSantis.

If you want to help out our team elect Ron DeSantis for President, we want to thank you for sending in just $5 or more! When you do, we’ll send you a free bumper sticker! No matter where you put your sticker, you could be making the difference in this election by spreading the word. We want to earn your support, and we’ll send you exactly what you need when you join our investor team.

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af3aa7513b837fc8abb890498f5bec92b5e0c03c9fcf6f457baeefd4c7aad0183dfbc8956158cf12c6922f1e022d8c02086143d9fb6a946b05527b565e56ac5f

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I will not yield. Not one inch.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I hope you’ll give me a moment to update you on all that is going on.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3572%2E5257348%2EQ2ihMo)
Derek,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[donate $3 to my campaign ahead of Thursday’s end-of-month deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=aug2023_abs_em.yit-u7&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230827_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3572%2E5257348%2EQ2ihMo)** But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to update you on all that is going on.
Not long ago, Republicans took the step of censuring me in the House.
Censuring a representative is an extraordinary step — one that’s only been reserved for a few dozen times in our nation’s two-century history.
Their reason? Political retribution for exposing Donald Trump’s Russia and Ukraine misconduct and for holding him accountable during his first impeachment trial.
Kevin McCarthy backed the censure resolution to appease Trump and his MAGA members in Congress. In fact, Trump threatened to primary any Republican who voted against the resolution. Many Republican members who opposed it, then folded like a tent, and when the time came, the measure passed by a party-line vote.
Unfortunately, it’s clear the GOP still sees me as their biggest threat — because the attacks haven’t stopped.
Just last week, Senator Lindsey Graham went on a rant and said I should “be in jail for 1,000 years.” Trump is even coming to California next month...
**As you can see, these MAGA attacks are getting more and more desperate by the day, Derek.** They know how effective I am, so they are prepared to throw every dirty trick in the book to sabotage my campaign for truth and justice — especially as the election gets closer.
**But like I said on the House floor when they censured me:_I am honored to have earned their enmity. I am flattered by their falsehoods. And I will not yield. Not one inch._**
**[I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so it will take a movement of grassroots supporters to overcome Donald Trump and his allies’ attacks. Will you add in a donation of $3 or more before our end-of-month deadline this Thursday?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=aug2023_abs_em.yit-u7&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230827_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3572%2E5257348%2EQ2ihMo)**

clean_body: | I hope you’ll give me a moment to update you on all that is going on. Derek, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to update you on all that is going on. Not long ago, Republicans took the step of censuring me in the House. Censuring a representative is an extraordinary step — one that’s only been reserved for a few dozen times in our nation’s two-century history. Their reason? Political retribution for exposing Donald Trump’s Russia and Ukraine misconduct and for holding him accountable during his first impeachment trial. Kevin McCarthy backed the censure resolution to appease Trump and his MAGA members in Congress. In fact, Trump threatened to primary any Republican who voted against the resolution. Many Republican members who opposed it, then folded like a tent, and when the time came, the measure passed by a party-line vote. Unfortunately, it’s clear the GOP still sees me as their biggest threat — because the attacks haven’t stopped. Just last week, Senator Lindsey Graham went on a rant and said I should “be in jail for 1,000 years.” Trump is even coming to California next month... As you can see, these MAGA attacks are getting more and more desperate by the day, Derek. They know how effective I am, so they are prepared to throw every dirty trick in the book to sabotage my campaign for truth and justice — especially as the election gets closer. But like I said on the House floor when they censured me:I am honored to have earned their enmity. I am flattered by their falsehoods. And I will not yield. Not one inch. body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 27, 2023

White House official
humiliates and exposes Biden with one slip of the tongue

The Biden administration is
a dumpster fire. If they can't get their act together, it's all
over for the ailing president.

And this White House official
humiliated and exposed Biden with one slip of the tongue.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Congress sent a letter to
the White House accusing Biden of this crazy crime

President Biden's
past is catching up to him. And he's not going to like the
consequences.
➞ Continue Reading

Biden's biggest blunder yet
just sent the White House up in flames

Ever since the day he
was inaugurated, drastic mistakes have plagued President Biden
and his team. But this puts the icing on the cake.
➞ Continue Reading

A Biden appointed judge
just made a ruling that sent Republicans' heads spinning

Radical leftism is
spreading around the country. But thanks to Joe Biden, that
spread is happening quicker than anticipated.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: POLL: Senate race in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This will be our toughest fight yet.
| Friend —

We’ve always known that an open Senate seat in a swing state would be close. But yesterday, a new poll further proved that out.

A new poll released by the National Republican Senate Committee of Michigan voters shows a generic Republican candidate in a statistical dead heat with Elissa: 2024 Michigan Senate Race
Elissa Slotkin (D) 42%
Republican candidate (R) 44%
Undecided: 14% | [DONATE NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51973?t=6&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
---
Despite the great success Michigan Democrats have had recently, Michiganders know it’s not at all permanent: Michigan is a swingy state that can go back and forth from Democrat to Republican if we don’t stay sharp and organized.

**While it’s clear this race will be our toughest fight yet, Elissa is no stranger to tough races, and we know exactly what it will take to win.** She’s won three tough elections in five years, and she has a serious, data-informed plan to win.

That’s why we’ve started building a foundation early to reach voters in every corner of Michigan and educate them on Elissa’s background, and why she’s the best person to represent our state in the U.S. Senate.

This poll shows that right now, 14% of Michigan voters are undecided and 46% of independent voters have yet to hear about Elissa, so there’s still a lot of work we have to do to win. We need to get to these folks through TV ads, digital outreach, and by expanding our ground game to meet people where they are.

**But the stakes are high – this poll proves that Democrats’ majority in the Senate will come down to what happens right here in Michigan.** We can’t take anything for granted, and we can’t take our foot off the gas.

So, if there was ever a time to make a donation to help Elissa keep this seat blue, it’s right now.

[_Will you split $10 between Elissa’s campaign for Senate and the Voter Protection Project in Michigan today?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51973?t=7&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51974?t=8&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51975?t=9&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51976?t=10&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51977?t=11&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51978?t=12&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)
Thank you. We couldn’t do any of this without you,

Team Slotkin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10083%2E878179%2Ehca5Cd)

A new poll released by the National Republican Senate Committee of Michigan voters shows a generic Republican candidate in a statistical dead heat with Elissa: 2024 Michigan Senate Race Elissa Slotkin (D) 42% Republican candidate (R) 44% Undecided: 14% | Despite the great success Michigan Democrats have had recently, Michiganders know it’s not at all permanent: Michigan is a swingy state that can go back and forth from Democrat to Republican if we don’t stay sharp and organized. While it’s clear this race will be our toughest fight yet, Elissa is no stranger to tough races, and we know exactly what it will take to win. She’s won three tough elections in five years, and she has a serious, data-informed plan to win. That’s why we’ve started building a foundation early to reach voters in every corner of Michigan and educate them on Elissa’s background, and why she’s the best person to represent our state in the U.S. Senate. This poll shows that right now, 14% of Michigan voters are undecided and 46% of independent voters have yet to hear about Elissa, so there’s still a lot of work we have to do to win. We need to get to these folks through TV ads, digital outreach, and by expanding our ground game to meet people where they are. But the stakes are high – this poll proves that Democrats’ majority in the Senate will come down to what happens right here in Michigan. We can’t take anything for granted, and we can’t take our foot off the gas. So, if there was ever a time to make a donation to help Elissa keep this seat blue, it’s right now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately: Thank you. We couldn’t do any of this without you, Team Slotkin | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. name: Susan Swecker
subject: Abortion is on the ballot in VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
What this year’s Virginia elections are really about is abortion. DPVA Chairwoman Susan Swecker was just quoted in an article published by The New Republic stating that, “The Senate blue brick wall was the only thing that stopped us in the last two years from banning abortion in Virginia. We cannot turn the whole state government over to the MAGA party.”

|
---
Derek, What this year’s Virginia elections are really about is abortion. [DPVA Chairwoman Susan Swecker was just quoted in an article published by The New Republic stating that, “The Senate blue brick wall was the only thing that stopped us in the last two years from banning abortion in Virginia. We cannot turn the whole state government over to the MAGA party.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68752319/424035341/-700191708?a=https%3a%2f%2fnewrepublic.com%2farticle%2f175181%2f2023-election-virginia-youngkin-abortion&c=E,1,yAwbOcMwSoCL-YMAlOhp-PEHyfw_2qGyo4cDyln7wO3ebgkWi9UUQRi_iHZL25MYK2QGQ2xK71OOtujbjyNcwJlgFKi-0N8vNdABpi8UgdB0sg0J_cCBUtk,&typo=1&refcode=dpva-em-082723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTViNGExMC1mZjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cIlxbj85oO4EPrAErg80U7r4rJGTNKzQpJ7KfbMOBuA=&emci=1218ff28-df44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b55b4a10-ff44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15759664) Simply put we HAVE to keep our VA State Senate majority and take back the VA House. My favorite part of my job as Speaker of the House is talking to conservatives all over America to see where they stand on the issues.

Right now, I’m reaching out to you because I want your input.

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5123?t=1007&amount=25&akid=393%2E52803%2EiCjj67 ][IMG]

When you’re a child, your mind is soaking up everything,
Peter.

You’re growing, learning, understanding, and slowly but surely, evolving
into the person you eventually become.

You’ve probably heard me talk about my great-grandmother Maebell James,
but ever since I was little, she taught me that it’s our responsibility to
help others, even when it isn’t easy.

If you don’t like something, she’d say, “Go farther and do better.” That
message has been my north star during my time in public service.

Together, we’re going to go farther and do better so that future
generations have safe communities, a healthy and habitable planet, and a
system that benefits working families.

So even though I’m sharing a throwback with you, I want to be clear that
my message in this race is about moving Maryland forward.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5123?t=1008&amount=25&akid=393%2E52803%2EiCjj67 ]I need your help right now making that vision a reality,
Peter. Would you please consider
contributing $25 to my campaign for the U.S. Senate so we can go farther
and do better together?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: won’t be a walk in the park
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
Team – since I announced my run for Attorney General a few months ago, I’ve been overwhelmed by the amount of support this team has received.

But this campaign isn’t about me – it’s about supporting local communities and defending the rights of _every_ Pennsylvanian. I want to help build a Commonwealth where everyone can live with dignity, safety, and respect.

**This next election won’t be a walk in the park, though.** Far-right forces are already hard at work, and they’ll try every trick in the book to mislead voters about their unpopular, extreme policies.

**With the support of this grassroots movement, I know we can defeat the far-right come 2024 – _but only if this entire people-powered team works together._**
