After I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General in 2014, I knew the amount of responsibility that fell on my shoulders. Pennsylvanians were counting on me to protect taxpayers from waste, fraud, and abuse at every level of government.

And after serving two terms as Auditor General, I couldn’t be more proud of the work I accomplished in that role – reducing the backlog of rape kits and getting victims the justice they deserve, exposing 58,000 unanswered phone calls at the child abuse hotline and demanding improvements to our child protection services, as well as going after millions in wasteful spending in our charter school system to get more resources for our students and teachers – just to name a few.

**Now, I’m ready to continue putting in the work for everyday Pennsylvanians as Attorney General.**

I’ll always stand up to protect the rights and freedoms of every Pennsylvanian,**but first, I need to win this critically important race next year.**

**[Please, become a Founding Donor right now to help my team reach voters in every corner of our Commonwealth – your support goes a long way toward defeating the far-right.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68752518/424035783/-412144306?refcode=email_082723_eom1_t1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzdmNmI3ZS1mZjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYz-PgXJ4FEdlg844JNTZeoN4w-A_NmPMmDvtHUc86A=)**

I’m truly grateful for your support in this important race – let’s win this thing.

– Eugene

This is just the beginning of the Republicans’ plan to ban abortion care nationwide: | |

Peter, **** Medication abortion saves lives, and Congresswoman Cori Bush is leading the effort in Congress to protect our access to it. **As part of the Republicans’ plan to ban abortion care nationwide, anti-abortion advocates have seen some recent success in federal courts as they try to limit access to the abortion pill Mifepristone.** Cori recently led a roundtable discussion with Democrats on the House Oversight Committee about medication abortion, which has been proven safe and effective for over 20 years, and is now used for over 50% of abortions in the United States. Cori also introduced the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ , which would ensure that people seeking abortion care can always access medication abortion through telehealth and certified pharmacies, including mail-order pharmacies. This legislation is more urgent than ever, and it removes barriers to care for marginalized communities. Accessing medication abortion at home is a lifeline for low-income people who can’t afford to take time off work, get child care, or arrange to travel hundreds of miles to an abortion clinic. [**As unelected judges and anti-abortion lawmakers try to strip away our rights, we need Cori Bush’s leadership in Congress to protect life-saving abortion care. [**Let's raise our voices and demand that Republicans come to the table to work towards a solution. clean_body: | | | | This week, the MAGA extremist House Freedom Caucus formally came out against a short-term government funding bill – in other words they're trying to force a government shutdown. Let me be clear: Kevin McCarthy must not let the extremists in the Freedom Caucus attack American families and businesses. We've been able to work across the aisle to fund the government and avoid a shutdown time and time again, and this latest partisan game from the Trump wing of the Republican party is dangerous, reckless, and would damage our country. There is a looming deadline on September 30, and right now, we're approaching another moment where the House Freedom Caucus is holding our country hostage to satisfy their fever dreams of political extremism — things like cutting Social Security and Medicare, tossing children out of child care, and of course further restricting access to abortion. Misguided is an understatement. Democrats are working towards a government funding deal. We know that there's too much at stake to play chicken with a government shutdown. A shutdown will only hurt hard-working Americans. Congress doesn't need games, it needs common sense. Onward! name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What a night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Did you see the debate?

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9gHwmHN5NrcguqMXBLCORdXNFWsgwjMIZW9BbWjf1KgnWz3GrjovaLuUDSo_S26d3nsFECTZTdviJX-TW9uWDBmp_npl4nb1j6U04cPBK-DpxegWa8b2PgBZufKHBKOIbde-xSFziza9NwQZvONHFay0YQ_caIF9FIE06R4RqaQiQNq5Zx7XDEvjkyAauLsk7P5VBS_jouMV8UBzVRwtrse1vVH7LctftqJAdsEGaNFUZ1PtnHAsSX7ryeTDoYStQ70MOECsVhrxlu0QAhp9Mz7uPPIXA2l9zvyZZo80WOHKuaXfxMfqA7y2Iuxwsia4KY8P9qymsWOJdEojtdtzMMrKA1V4tXZtPxijo3Mn1foTYC1D0p9D2yCJxCjeLlR0ug%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

When I stepped off the stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory was. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9gHwmHN5NrcguqMXBLCORdXNFWsgwjMIZW9BbWjf1KgnWz3GrjovaLuUDSo_S26d3nsFECTZTdviJX-TW9uWDBmp_npl4nb1j6U04cPBK-DpxegWa8b2PgBZufKHBKOIbde-xSFziza9NwQZvONHFay0YQ_caIF9FIE06R4RqaQiQNq5Zx7XDEvjkyAauLsk7P5VBS_jouMV8UBzVRwtrse1vVH7LctftqJAdsEGaNFUzlmfTJ_rRob2AMqKyfdeKQl5udCjqqIfvQJJbeuxTpDdu37dw7N16GmT2M4nMHqTWDl8khv8Y8nQ-HlO8GbjNvxVIaOXAGMFnZEXxCEyy86UOaV8ha7Ca2LbdUBIvNMiuvXtYyocSZGNU1DI2lGn8g%3D%3D)
---

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Fellow American, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and together, let's make America our first priority.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9gHwmHN5NrcguqMXBLCORdXNFWsgwjMIZW9BbWjf1KgnWz3GrjovaLuUDSo_S26d3nsFECTZTdviJX-TW9uWDBmp_npl4nb1j6U04cPBK-DpxegWa8b2PgBZufKHBKOIbde-xSFziza9NwQZvONHFay0YQ_caIF9FIE06R4RqaQiQNq5Zx7XDEvjkyAauLsk7P5VBS_jouMV8UBzVRwtrse1vVH7LctftqJAdsEGaNFUEDEGhrZa6zNKKPf0eUYjxQQbd73xvQbBX0zkGCeoAetQop3ZAQgJltIspeQCwEsz125Id0wwXQ_sgerJ7mIXwYhhMipgjSVLxqKLsK6Mo5mEUYJ5P9OuBsUz5L4LUC8s8ABhFLH9Tk96Hfvu46avsw%3D%3D)**

_Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution?_

America First,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9gHwmHN5NrcguqMXBLCORdXNFWsgwjMIZW9BbWjf1KgnWz3GrjovaLuUDSo_S26d3nsFECTZTdviJX-TW9uWDBmp_npl4nb1j6U04cPBK-DpxegWa8b2PgBZufKHBKOIbde-xSFziza9NwQZvONHFay0YQ_caIF9FIE06R4RqaQiQNq5Zx7XDEvjkyAauLsk7P5VBS_jouMV8UBzVRwtrse1vVH7LctftqJAdsEGaNFUz2zHuYmMCqMhStonoPatJUje3HK9K2r0NWUSJwM1wZRMJHWUpnxmWXfaOOCcIH4gy4BPFGXKFA2SIbUkcPaPllBGgdvCCjETLYBMWoQFNr0kL_3npuHZJLliITb9NTx6fO293K_btahapI7tm0DXmw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9gHwmHN5NrcguqMXBLCORdXNFWsgwjMIZW9BbWjf1KgnWz3GrjovaLuUDSo_S26d3nsFECTZTdviJX-TW9uWDBmp_npl4nb1j6U04cPBK-DpxegWa8b2PgBZufKHBKOIbde-xSFziza9NwQZvONHFay0YQ_caIF9FIE06R4RqaQiQNq5Zx7XDEvjkyAauLsk7P5VBS_jouMV8UBzVRwtrse1vVH7LctftqJAdsEGaNFU0gRNH91ctk91VOnPADloWS05YQgmke7PxseMd_wn6rYxpExs3InP31TRP_e3wWytruCYsJ9gdOXEiVpHLlB87iH9q9Wv4OdvENG33hNcbXmCvI962Vc0qNlFLmKoE9kXs_dBYLw_TGaa4egaP9_2MA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9gHwmHN5NrcguqMXBLCORdXNFWsgwjMIZW9BbWjf1KgnWz3GrjovaLuUDSo_S26d3nsFECTZTdviJX-TW9uWDBmp_npl4nb1j6U04cPBK-DpxegWa8b2PgBZufKHBKOIbde-xSFziza9NwQZvONHFay0YQ_caIF9FIE06R4RqaQiQNq5Zx7XDEvjkyAauLsk7P5VBS_jouMV8UBzVRwtrse1vVH7LctftqJAdsEGaNFUL2coBPeEkPnYNqXgNoyE-ATUPHPN04-zDWXMi5mMMpXJSDpD3yHk-ga9tlLgGLhA15jzqT8av4yNlwUBK2VEJJ_iG537-fn9dGVFppsx3F7LUnhJqmEV3_2NiP7oBB5TgPgW8UN79rCeoQnIjtaKuQ%3D%3D)

---

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ada0ba7045ba4c52bd6a8a7ce7a9cd56&_e=IFVSJ9G-IjqDqEPtgBPT9nxhHtGbMsH_WGnjDwCjglMbCzzt-q_dQwE1M3akhfkCY6BIg_g0HWQfIOQC5Vm99U4vrOQ99Hd6a9BrCrboTOMP3wruC-S3Qrhia6098RE2XGosgnTwh4_Ei1rIr6h6DTwz9FJPXtorMmmNlzd_vUB-Df-K66WZ4muPxPOi2Y9SAgotU2rGy5WzbgpBBuND5vNnyufAEzHTKBD-Z5mue1Y%3D)
---|---|---

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Infuriating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
We’re seeing up close what Republicans do when they’re in power.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68753330/424037944/146446798?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230827_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYWU2ZDhhLTAzNDUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xyF_PeSWfhcQQlbLagwyNEwCHjGAzrIMG40pkChkbac=) Peter, this is infuriating.

We watched Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies try to censure and sue a sitting Democrat for daring to hold Donald Trump accountable.

If that's not enough, extremists like Lauren Boebert are now pushing Congress to _impeach_ President Joe Biden.

Let’s be clear: these folks aren't interested in governing. What they are interested in is weakening our President. What they are interested in is attacking women's rights, banning books, and making it harder for working families to get by in this country.

**That’s why I'm fighting so hard to take back our majority, and an important step you can take to join me is making sure Will Rollins has the funds he needs to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st District.**

Flipping _five House seats_ in the coming election puts Democrats back in control. Will is running in a "must-win" district that almost went blue in 2022.

**[Before Will's August fundraising deadline, split a donation of $10, or whatever you can afford, between Upset the Setup and Will’s campaign to stop Republicans from destroying everything we've worked so hard to build.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68753331/424037948/146446798?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230827_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYWU2ZDhhLTAzNDUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xyF_PeSWfhcQQlbLagwyNEwCHjGAzrIMG40pkChkbac=)** | **[CHIP IN $10 TO SUPPORT WILL ROLLINS AND UPSET THE SETUP IN THE FIGHT TO FLIP THE HOUSE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68753333/424037949/146446798?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230827_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYWU2ZDhhLTAzNDUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xyF_PeSWfhcQQlbLagwyNEwCHjGAzrIMG40pkChkbac=)**
---
I’m proud of what Democrats have accomplished:

– The creation of more jobs in two years than any other president in history.
– Created 13 million jobs in President Biden's first term.
– Enacted the Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in half.
– Made life-saving vaccines available to every American.
– And much more...

clean_body: We’re seeing up close what Republicans do when they’re in power. | = Peter, this is infuriating. We watched Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies try to censure and sue a sitting Democrat for daring to hold Donald Trump accountable. If that's not enough, extremists like Lauren Boebert are now pushing Congress to impeach President Joe Biden. Let’s be clear: these folks aren't interested in governing. What they are interested in is weakening our President. What they are interested in is attacking women's rights, banning books, and making it harder for working families to get by in this country. That’s why I'm fighting so hard to take back our majority, and an important step you can take to join me is making sure Will Rollins has the funds he needs to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st District. Flipping five House seats in the coming election puts Democrats back in control. Will is running in a "must-win" district that almost went blue in 2022. = | = I’m proud of what Democrats have accomplished: – The creation of more jobs in two years than any other president in history. – Created 13 million jobs in President Biden's first term. – Enacted the Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in half. – Made life-saving vaccines available to every American. – And much more... We've made incredible progress, but Republicans in the House will stop at nothing to put a halt to our work. name: Jon Tester
subject: They can’t beat me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
I'll be honest, folks—
Fundraising is one of the worst parts of this job, but just a few moments from now I’ll have to ask you to make a donation.
Give me a chance to explain: I’m not asking this often because I like it. I do it because national Republicans and out-of-state super PACs are pledging to spend outrageous amounts of money to attack my character and the only chance we have to respond is by collecting grassroots donations from a whole lot of people.
Folks, my opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am.
I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home.
Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us. That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me.
But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history.
So with all eyes on our race, I have to ask, can I count on you to make a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton right now to help us reach our end-of-month goal in a few days? This is important. I need your help. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks for everything you do for our campaign. We’ve built a great team in Montana that relies on grassroots donations to keep us in the fight. Your support really makes a huge difference. I hope you know that.
All my best,
Jon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

Peter,

When I stepped off the debate stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8241dd10eda64f0f82c43ad0f2859092&_e=lg5iYiuoRVE3u5-S2G8Nk968yDqbPkVzaWZAher5kU1iV8HaxvFPsJRXA937Eb_voU4d6KiKibEL9mbYc2_qeN2NwlQe6NV0QYi2YzEV5FK1C3Sv5d6HmdmZx6wsVc4ooA8YSMz7W70RdU9gi1MBTkcvJefUzfPL_PSoorHtvpRW_cKEYLt1KHRvfVl6dJMxPjl0tViHC2cWyvO0q8HLJVfY3fNxbfFRSKJSp1ffih6tmNyjuVBfmnZXQgZmTULzDhamtlBYvc1dKj9HJMH3oGWF_8QhaHC0-M95k43YAdToPxnpcl-NfP7U-nUes4wNI6dxaqj5xvzodgyXclm2h0oq_8Nb0ujZl5afm8VxMr9ZjfJbX2An3YiWUAQx4m-tiepTsO0a40yYuo6-GPXbbA%3D%3D)
---

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Peter, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and together, let's make America our first priority.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8241dd10eda64f0f82c43ad0f2859092&_e=lg5iYiuoRVE3u5-S2G8Nk968yDqbPkVzaWZAher5kU1iV8HaxvFPsJRXA937Eb_voU4d6KiKibEL9mbYc2_qeN2NwlQe6NV0QYi2YzEV5FK1C3Sv5d6HmdmZx6wsVc4ooA8YSMz7W70RdU9gi1MBTkcvJefUzfPL_PSoorHtvpRW_cKEYLt1KHRvfVl6dJMxPjl0tViHC2cWyvO0q8HLJVfY3fNxbfFRSKJSp1ffih6tmNyjuVBfmnZXQgZmTULzEfKNPrd0gfWXYOAcsdSqPqnwUzKPWdp4vgNpep6NCMXCZ7ZCdrdpvT15JVvfSYovCQJ1hOSxCkTSJuRoj6J12Nxhgp45C4XiWMGuryqxF0oqxg9dl8UqjVz0s8Dk2yzzUxL0JL9bVDDuQSKSd0rr-w%3D%3D)**

_Peter - are you ready for the revolution?_

America First,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8241dd10eda64f0f82c43ad0f2859092&_e=lg5iYiuoRVE3u5-S2G8Nk968yDqbPkVzaWZAher5kU1iV8HaxvFPsJRXA937Eb_voU4d6KiKibEL9mbYc2_qeN2NwlQe6NV0QYi2YzEV5FK1C3Sv5d6HmdmZx6wsVc4ooA8YSMz7W70RdU9gi1MBTkcvJefUzfPL_PSoorHtvpRW_cKEYLt1KHRvfVl6dJMxPjl0tViHC2cWyvO0q8HLJVfY3fNxbfFRSKJSp1ffih6tmNyjuVBfmnZXQgZmTULz18x0g9E43MPUKFNarJFXqlbcLjGxY1pS_Tf1LC2eOTKIcl9BocgFyl2aRzWuuxKH0jXU7PniRGvoCcdeUHCAJbCY-KqYnOnJA41GK0Yqx_R3wYR--CdgqSOJBlyWsNdpLLFB9KYncNKTMX36kjsCWA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8241dd10eda64f0f82c43ad0f2859092&_e=lg5iYiuoRVE3u5-S2G8Nk968yDqbPkVzaWZAher5kU1iV8HaxvFPsJRXA937Eb_voU4d6KiKibEL9mbYc2_qeN2NwlQe6NV0QYi2YzEV5FK1C3Sv5d6HmdmZx6wsVc4ooA8YSMz7W70RdU9gi1MBTkcvJefUzfPL_PSoorHtvpRW_cKEYLt1KHRvfVl6dJMxPjl0tViHC2cWyvO0q8HLJVfY3fNxbfFRSKJSp1ffih6tmNyjuVBfmnZXQgZmTULzDEEjw_6eqesQ6NMMszs9FtGWxDC2Eh3kc9oxzCpTkTQcDmglFJ8Z9hWbbjcbVpRZWW_IbkN6opdHo15hlzUdjNbyiBKC9DQXaAgxp3yVpOUerU1k7P4zdees_YMLcGgo7oHXTrpuCsht5IWJKuFumg%3D%3D)

America First, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:
| | | Peter,
The Democrats are coming to Florida, and they’re determined to ruin our state and turn it into the next failed Democrat experiment.

**They’re bringing their money and their woke agenda, and they have one target they’re laser-focused on: Republican Senator, Rick Scott.**

Rick is one of the most dependable conservative voices in the Senate, and he never backs down.

But for that exact reason, Democrats in Washington hate him. Joe Biden has attacked Rick more than any other Senator.

**There are just days to go until Rick’s end-of-month deadline, and the Democrats are _desperate_ to see us miss this goal. **

clean_body: I need to know if you’re with me in this fight. | = = Peter, here are a couple of urgent updates you need to know: 📅 We’re less than 75 days from Election Day in Mississippi. That means we can’t take our foot off the pedal, even for a second, if we want to connect with every possible voter before November 7th. 🥊 Tate Reeves is coming at us like there’s no tomorrow with smear campaigns and attack ads (both online and on the airwaves). The gloves are off, and I need to know you to have my back in this crucial moment. 💰 My team just set an ambitious $50,000 online goal by the end of August. We can’t afford to fall short of our goal — not when we're THIS close to election day. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let’s do this, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Soaring gas prices have become an unfortunate reality under Biden’s presidency.
And it’s no surprise, given Biden’s utter disdain for America’s energy producers.
I have repeatedly taken the Biden Administration to task for hamstringing our nation’s energy sector, and I will continue to do so at every opportunity.
But the sad state of the matter,**** Friend, is that we’ve got to******BEAT BIDEN****** and******TAKE BACK****** the Senate before true, lasting change can occur.

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Yet gas prices are soaring? Friend, I’m sure you’ve seen it too... Soaring gas prices have become an unfortunate reality under Biden’s presidency. And it’s no surprise, given Biden’s utter disdain for America’s energy producers. I have repeatedly taken the Biden Administration to task for hamstringing our nation’s energy sector, and I will continue to do so at every opportunity. But the sad state of the matter,** Friend, is that we’ve got to**BEAT BIDEN** and**TAKE BACK** the Senate before true, lasting change can occur. If you’ve saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will process immediately. | | Some of Biden’s**very first** executive orders as president were aimed at undermining America’s energy sector. He’s made his views clear. If he’s re-elected in 2024 and the Democrats retain control of the Senate, things are only going to get worse. We’ve got to come together to beat Biden and unleash America’s Energy Independence once and for all. Thank you, Bill Cassidy, M.D. | | Bill Cassidy, M.D. United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate?** Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | From The Desk of Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \- =

-Team Kildee
Begin Forwarded Message:
From: Dan Kildee
Subject: I want your input
Look, it’s no secret that dysfunction in Washington is at an all-time high.

**But I’m not letting that stop me from fighting for what really matters: lowering the cost of prescription drugs and health care, protecting Social Security and Medicare, defending abortion rights and fighting to bring good-paying manufacturing jobs to Michigan.**

This is what Michiganders sent me to Congress to do, and I’m not going to let the partisan gridlock get in my way.

And as we head into the fall and get ready for some tough fights in Washington, I want to hear from you.

**[Will you take a minute to fill out my short Congressional Priorities Survey and let me know what you want Congress to focus on when we get back to Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68759296/424044688/-839251829?refcode=email_082723_survey-kicker&source=email_082723_survey-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDZmNDZjYS0wYTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5hobB34XUBdA-JQpSxM0f7eDq_r4E-gN2n4eJMFgMs=&emci=4ec17b41-aa42-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d06f46ca-0a45-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**

| Hi there,

Every day I spend in Congress representing West Michigan, I am emboldened to continue my work. I know it matters that West Michigan has a representative in Congress who believes in Reproductive and LGQTQ rights. We’ll give you the good news first, Peter – **The good news:** The latest governor’s race polls show Shawn is well-positioned to make it to the runoff election this November. As the only Democrat in the race, Shawn is our best hope for a practical, compassionate governor who will put working families _first!_ **The bad news:** The last Democrat to win the governor’s race won by less than 3 percentage points. Throw in the fact that Landry has Donald Trump’s endorsement and the MAGA money machine behind him, and we’re looking at an even tougher race than _that._ **Where you come in, Peter:** Our campaign needs to raise **$30,000** in online donations by _this Thursday_ in order to go toe-to-toe with his campaign, and as of now we’ve barely made a dent. We need massive community support — YOUR support! — to hit this goal by the deadline, or else Shawn will struggle to beat those odds come November. **_[If we fall short, we’ll have to make costly budget cuts right when we should be kicking things into high gear. As the only Democrat in the race, Shawn is our best hope for a practical, compassionate governor who will put working families first! The bad news: The last Democrat to win the governor’s race won by less than 3 percentage points. Throw in the fact that Landry has Donald Trump’s endorsement and the MAGA money machine behind him, and we’re looking at an even tougher race than that. Where you come in, Peter: Our campaign needs to raise $30,000 in online donations by this Thursday in order to go toe-to-toe with his campaign, and as of now we’ve barely made a dent. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Today, our hearts are with Jacksonville, FL
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Yesterday in Jacksonville, Florida, a gunman shot and killed three Black people at a dollar store.
Now, once again, a community is forever scarred by the horror of anti-Black gun violence in America.
My heart goes out to the three individuals whose lives were stolen from them too soon, and for their families who have now been forever changed by this hate-fueled violence.
We live in a country where it is far too easy for hate-filled individuals to access guns. We must stand together and demand that our elected officials do more to keep guns out of the hands of people with the intention to harm others.
I am heartbroken, angry, and I won’t rest until we see a future free from gun violence in Florida and in every state in our nation.
Please keep standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230827-1-30&t=1&akid=6446%2E3935704%2ERw_pPG)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=6446%2E3935704%2ERw_pPG) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: When we combine our grassroots strength, our impact is amplified as we fight back against Big Oil. | | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out to let you know what we’re up against: The fossil fuel industry is spending millions of dollars in races across the country to make sure their political allies stay in office as they continue to burn planet-warming fossil fuels. I know we have strong grassroots support in you, and together we can fight for a cleaner and greener future by replacing fossil fuel allies with climate champions at every level of government. = | = No amount is too small. When we combine our grassroots strength, our impact is amplified as we fight back against Big Oil. With your support, I know the future of our planet is in good hands, but there is so much work to do. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell to protect our planet, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Diane Morgan, Our Revolution
subject: Did you see Amanda’s note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

Don’t want to take up too much of your time on the weekend, we are closing in on the last hours before our 7th Anniversary (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1008&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN) challenge ends. If you have a moment, read Amanda’s message below and donate before midnight Sunday. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1009&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN)

Fighting for women’s rights doesn’t only mean abortion rights - but I want to tell you how proud I am of our organizers on the ground here in Ohio who joined me to knock doors and get out the vote to defeat a far right attack on democracy and abortion rights last month.

Republicans thought they had a new blueprint to take away our rights, but thanks to our grassroots donors and activists, we stopped them in their tracks right here in Ohio.

Thank you all!

Diane Morgan,
Mobilization Coordinator, Our Revolution

------------------------------------------------------------
Begin forwarded message from Amanda Nichols:

Peter Willis —

Today is Women’s Equality Day, and the 103rd anniversary of the day women officially gained the right to vote in the US. We fought for that right just about as long as we’ve now held it — a good reminder that revolutions take time.

Our Revolution has been fighting for women since we were founded seven years ago, and we will fight another 100 years to secure our rights if we need to. This is where you come in.

In honor of Women’s Equality Day and our 7th Anniversary - we have been trying to recruit as many progressives as we can to give a gift in the next 24 hours. Many folks are adding $7 to their gift or adding $7 to their gift in honor of it. Are you in? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1010&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN)

In 2022, we helped elect fifty-seven(!!) women to office, including sending some incredible new members of Congress, including Summer Lee in Pennsylvania, Delia Ramirez in Illinois, and Becca Balint, the first woman ever to serve in Congress from Vermont.

And just earlier this month, with the help of grassroots donors like you, our volunteers mobilized thousands of Ohio voters to successfully protect abortion rights.

Our Revolution will always roll up its sleeves and do everything it can to elect and empower more women. Help us celebrate our accomplishments and keep fighting for progress. Give a gift today. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1011&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN)

From Medicare for All to living wages to putting an end to medical and student debt — these are all issues that impact women at a much higher rate than men.

We are here fighting for progress today thanks to the women and movements that came before us. And we’re building a lasting movement to make sure progress is never halted. Donate today and be part of our movement. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1012&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN)

When we organize, we win—

Amanda Nichols

Communications Director, Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1001&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1005&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230827_FR_wedfwd_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_wedfwd&t=1007&akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4594%2E5885482%2EmA2XzN

name: Katie Porter
subject: $1 given now goes further than $1 in March
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATIE PORTER FOR SENATE]
body:
[ https://act.katieporter.com/go/14559?t=1001&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4 ]Katie Porter for Senate

Derek,

For years, I was a leader in my kids’ Cub Scout troop—where planning ahead
was a big priority. I bring that same preparedness to our campaign, and
budgeting is an important part of that. We’re laying out our campaign’s
budget and strategy for the next few months so I’m reaching out to our
supporters: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230827-1?refcode=EMAK27_1_CLU_20230827_V1_F&refcode2=28765_3422442_c0GUZ4&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4 ]Can you make a donation today so we have the funds to reach
voters across the state?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230827-1?refcode=EMAK27_1_CLU_20230827_V1_F&refcode2=28765_3422442_c0GUZ4&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4 ][IMG]

In addition to helping us plan, dollars given now (while we’re still over
six months out from our primary) literally help us do more with less.
Early contributions help us lock in better TV advertisement rates. It’s
sort of like buying a plane ticket: when you buy in advance, you have more
options and better prices. But if you’re scrambling to buy the week
before, you might find yourself paying top dollar for a middle seat on a
6:00 AM flight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230827-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAK27_1_CLU_20230827_V1_F&refcode2=28765_3422442_c0GUZ4&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4 ]So what do you say,
Derek, can you make a
contribution of $5 today to help us gear up for the tough
race ahead?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230827-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAK27_1_CLU_20230827_V1_F&refcode2=28765_3422442_c0GUZ4&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4 ]Donate ›››

Thank you!!

Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=1002&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4
Update Your Information: https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer
Unsubscribe: https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=28765%2E3422442%2Ec0GUZ4

body:
Derek, we have a tough fight ahead of us, but it’s a fight we must win.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68767464/424049246/-235809255?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.27_b2_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk0ODRjNC0xMjQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3G5a_9PVlv2gKZqdwz0f5xh4TO9XdsvY98ahvbHXqWc=) **Ship, Shipmate, Self.**

Derek, that’s one of the first lessons I learned at the Naval Academy. You put the mission first, and you put others before yourself. **These values are core for me, and they're what this fight for our common good is all about.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68767465/424049247/-235809255?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.27_b2_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk0ODRjNC0xMjQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3G5a_9PVlv2gKZqdwz0f5xh4TO9XdsvY98ahvbHXqWc=) **Fighting for our common good means putting people first. And as long as I’m in Congress, you can count on me to never lose sight of that mission.**

**_But I can’t say the same about House Republicans._** With Kevin McCarthy at the helm, we’ve seen how their party is beholden to huge corporations and right-wing extremists, **and they’ll put those interests over our common good every single time.**

That’s why they’re so willing to turn their backs on our nation’s veterans. It’s why they’re unashamed in their attempts to carve out tax loopholes for mega-corporations while leaving everyday Americans in the dust. It’s what keeps them from reaching across the aisle to find common sense solutions on the issues hurting working families.

**[Derek, we have a tough fight ahead of us, but it’s a fight we must win. The American people can’t handle another two years of Republican control, so please, can you chip in to my people-powered campaign today to help me deliver the Democratic House Majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68767466/424049248/-235809255?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.27_b2_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk0ODRjNC0xMjQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3G5a_9PVlv2gKZqdwz0f5xh4TO9XdsvY98ahvbHXqWc=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Derek, we have a tough fight ahead of us, but it’s a fight we must win. | = Ship, Shipmate, Self. Derek, that’s one of the first lessons I learned at the Naval Academy. You put the mission first, and you put others before yourself. These values are core for me, and they're what this fight for our common good is all about. = Fighting for our common good means putting people first. And as long as I’m in Congress, you can count on me to never lose sight of that mission. But I can’t say the same about House Republicans. With Kevin McCarthy at the helm, we’ve seen how their party is beholden to huge corporations and right-wing extremists, and they’ll put those interests over our common good every single time. That’s why they’re so willing to turn their backs on our nation’s veterans. It’s why they’re unashamed in their attempts to carve out tax loopholes for mega-corporations while leaving everyday Americans in the dust. It’s what keeps them from reaching across the aisle to find common sense solutions on the issues hurting working families. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being in this fight for our common good with me. Chris Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: Sen. Josh Hawley
subject: Will it be YOU?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
I know you’re getting a lot of emails, but it’s critical that you read this. **[I’ll cut to the chase - we’re behind on where we need to be, but if every patriot who receives this email pitches in just $5 right now, we’ll be back on track.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d98548023a7740af99414597afe0505a&_e=xlhxLtvNcqxJeMaHi_XL1aHUr0HoiYLOiHJCLxSjn_eMMz5RaXF2SdWqC9Gt9ewt4UdUTknlZIC8PKoEv01Bh-oQiOQR_1xJYFBQsNm7xhs4DC4dgP4I56BkSvkoOnfvTl711gRU5R4HH8BLThKoggNSX6bi4RaVdXEzn2i__qChI--U0eCem5iNC4k81EI9XJQliVQ_ivnul_CYMIRnA94r1lZcuHTc9OyhIU0MwxRehgRTjJXlZt_8l-A-cGBMdwKJXebmUwzTPXn8VOhu2p_TZ4uJkV1-FQTUbDs9yJU0MsjZBl9zKW34dT0XqoYPxV1wh84WJiGIJSOjazWrXMPWvMNFW354xUpKrebSCn_0D-ZCBWE49RMgFcaj0pY46B-xq4UrZyo1yMQUPrEEqQ%3D%3D) **Let me take a minute to explain why this goal is so important.

Every quarter, the FEC releases fundraising numbers for every candidate in America. That means everyone will be able to see where we stand against our opponents.

**In a race as important and close as ours, we can’t afford to show ANY signs of weakness.**

Even though Election Day may seem far away, we can’t afford to be complacent. The backbone of our campaign is our grassroots team, and I’m calling on you to step up now.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Never back down with a bully
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
McCarthy’s violent threats won’t go unchecked on my watch. | Peter,

You know me. You've helped me. **You have my back — and I have yours.**

So it probably doesn't surprise you that when Kevin McCarthy threatened to fight me on the House Floor recently, I told him what I thought of him. **And when he dared me to say it again, I repeated what I thought of him.**

Look: These MAGA losers prefer violence over votes. They think you and I will back down. _We won't._ **Freedom and democracy are worth defending. I'll defend it every day.**

[We can send Kevin McCarthy home and make him the shortest-serving Speaker ever. subject: Can you join me?
body:
We will continue to stand tall in the face of Republican attacks by electing Democrats nationwide. | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpmsjLe4IkEsyOVd0I9i3rb3E3ILjTG4FxTiSYfStlmMzxXbTghOHuOSUmlPxChSSXVLAsxV3-KoqaCwcbsy_HscnaqP8scNHv6zjqFjEhcHpFrOx6iMLDtW6bhdc7doZeA8LCCEaZri2ZbQxyOsFREfSG4EKQv43ErsdJNFTQwDTC071dp4x5cYFx9eWQqQkMiCIjk20nbrOp54Qs9m9NZm2F664q2C4aNAG_Lj6nCujLoSe1ux3owUFoCekm30_DVz6c6THBVVefHDMoSels4Eh3MaahxCkyHh-_4tedjFgfTsGGpc68H4yWaYsBsQIPcGg_dfyhwpyiJLFws4y_7A/3z3/vUyM9lJ5TxWzhXAy8RdkmA/h0/k0VgtnZl6-kBY3NXgBWLz3wB8wpXrM2PIL136L3kMAE) Hi there – I’m reaching out ahead of August’s fundraising deadline with an urgent message, and I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out: In 2020, Democrats like you kept the faith, defeated Trump, and elected President Joe Biden with over 81 million votes. In 2022, our momentum continued powering Democrats to victory – we flipped four key chambers, secured three new trifectas, and defended all of our existing majorities. **But Republicans’ extremism persists, threatening our democracy, our communities, and our most fundamental freedoms.** The challenges we continue to face as a country are daunting. The GOP has been relentless in their efforts to roll back hard-won progress, restricting voting rights, banning abortion, attacking the LGBTQ+ community, and so much more – and state Democrats have been on the frontlines of this fight. That’s why I’m committed to electing strong Democratic leaders at every level of the ballot and supporting organizations like the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee. **The DLCC is fighting back against Republicans' extreme platform in the states and working to secure a better future in communities like yours.** The road to electing Democrats does not come without challenges. That’s why I’m turning to you to join me in this fight before August’s fundraising deadline. clean_body: We will continue to stand tall in the face of Republican attacks by electing Democrats nationwide. | | | | | Hi there – I’m reaching out ahead of August’s fundraising deadline with an urgent message, and I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out: In 2020, Democrats like you kept the faith, defeated Trump, and elected President Joe Biden with over 81 million votes. In 2022, our momentum continued powering Democrats to victory – we flipped four key chambers, secured three new trifectas, and defended all of our existing majorities. But Republicans’ extremism persists, threatening our democracy, our communities, and our most fundamental freedoms. The challenges we continue to face as a country are daunting. The GOP has been relentless in their efforts to roll back hard-won progress, restricting voting rights, banning abortion, attacking the LGBTQ+ community, and so much more – and state Democrats have been on the frontlines of this fight. That’s why I’m committed to electing strong Democratic leaders at every level of the ballot and supporting organizations like the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee. The DLCC is fighting back against Republicans' extreme platform in the states and working to secure a better future in communities like yours. The road to electing Democrats does not come without challenges. That’s why I’m turning to you to join me in this fight before August’s fundraising deadline. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between the DLCC PAC and Onward Together. | | | | | The DLCC is standing firm against Republicans’ assault on our fundamental freedoms – working tirelessly to recruit, train, and elect Democrats who will fight back against the GOP’s far-right agenda. We will continue to stand tall in the face of Republican attacks by electing Democrats nationwide in 2023, 2024, and beyond. But this work is costly, time-consuming, and all-encompassing. We can’t do it without you. These are real sick people. “ Democrats celebrate, Biden fundraises off Trump arrest” 'I think today's a great day to give to my campaign,' Biden wrote [SOURCE: Fox News] It’s not enough for the ruling party to ARREST its leading opponent as an innocent man and force me to take a mugshot despite being one of the most recognizable people in the world. They feel the need to rub their lawless corruption in our faces by gleefully RAISING MONEY off of my wrongful arrest. It’s no secret that Crooked Joe is behind these sham indictments and arrests. And now he’s fundraising off of the very prosecutions that he himself orchestrated. Let’s also not forget that the Fulton County District Attorney who brought this indictment forward ALSO fundraised off of her prosecution against me. It’s now CRYSTAL CLEAR that the Department of Justice and these Radical Left District Attorneys are an arm of the Biden for President Campaign. Our country is in a very dark place right now. If we don’t put a stop to the downward trajectory of our nation, the United States will become the new Soviet Union. But I know in my HEART that the American people see right through these vicious attacks – and voters will not stand for this. Today, I am asking YOU to prove it in the strongest possible way. Let us send the most powerful (and peaceful!) message we can by making the next 24 hours our greatest fundraising surge in history. And let me add that it’s not necessarily the amount of money you give that matters, but the number of patriots who said, “ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!” and made a contribution to stand for true justice in America. clean_body: But they believed in the power of opportunity| | | Friend, Our political leaders are obsessed with grievance and victimhood. My parents immigrated to this country with almost no money in their pockets,but they believed in the power of opportunity. They worked hard and raised two kids with a focus on education and achievement. That’s how you get ahead in America. The woke Leftists that run Washington, DC, are obsessed with race, gender, and sexuality. They’ve told us to celebrate our diversity and differences so much that we’ve forgotten all the ideals that unite us as Americans. I’m running for President to change that. Friend, in order to shake the far-Left’s grip on our society, we have to in next year’s elections. I know you’re up for the challenge, so I’m asking that you contribute today to help me and other America First candidates win in 2024. : YOU CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDINGDEADLINE: 10 MINUTES Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy | | Paid for by the NRSC | | Unsubscribe from future emails

| Peter, Last month, I emailed you about Senator Tommy Tuberville’s egregious abuse of power. He was single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 200 military servicemembers — and vital military leadership positions were going unfilled because of his performative and dangerous antics.
_**Now, over a month later, he is still delaying these promotions.**_ For the first time in Defense Department history, _**three of the eight most senior military offices in our country are vacant**_ , thanks to Tuberville. The number of servicemembers awaiting promotion has risen to 300, _**39 in Virginia alone**_. As Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin said, “This is unprecedented. It is unnecessary. And it is unsafe.”

clean_body: For the first time in Defense Department history, three of the eight most senior military offices in our country are vacant, thanks to Tuberville. | = | Peter, Last month, I emailed you about Senator Tommy Tuberville’s egregious abuse of power. He was single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 200 military servicemembers — and vital military leadership positions were going unfilled because of his performative and dangerous antics. Now, over a month later, he is still delaying these promotions. For the first time in Defense Department history, three of the eight most senior military offices in our country are vacant , thanks to Tuberville. The number of servicemembers awaiting promotion has risen to 300, 39 in Virginia alone. As Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin said, “This is unprecedented. It is unnecessary. And it is unsafe.” | = As the representative for Marine Corps Base Quantico and thousands of servicemembers across Virginia’s 7th District, I will not stand for political games interfering with our military readiness, and I’ll keep calling out the disrespect to our servicemembers and the danger to our national security inherent in his actions. = | = I appreciate your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. subject: A little bit about me

body:
|
#
---
Hey there, I want to take a moment and share a bit of my story with you, but if you’re short on time today and want to support my work to fight for families across Central and Southern Illinois, **[please consider pitching in before Thursday’s August fundraising deadline now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68768299/424052752/-2053028736?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230827_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ5MzA5Ny0xYTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jXieW62ruusqd3svZxblM50hSMT-Kq2XROg_QAg-FM=)** I was born in Peoria, Illinois, and grew up surrounded by the same kinds of folks that I now represent in Congress. My grandpa was a union painter, and my grandma was a public school teacher. They built honest, middle-class lives with those jobs. With their guidance, I developed a passion for supporting working people, which led to me joining the labor movement shortly after graduating college. I traveled across the country fighting to get firefighters, grocery workers, and meatpackers better training, wages, and the workplace safety protections they deserved. I’ve seen firsthand the challenges plaguing working families, and I’ve witnessed the middle-class life afforded by my grandparents slip away for countless Illinois families. **That's why I ran for Congress — to ensure working families in Central and Southern Illinois would have a voice in Washington.** Thanks to this grassroots team, we flipped this seat, and I became the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. Since then, I’ve been meeting with constituents to hear what issues matter most to them, and working across the aisle to break through partisan gridlock to deliver meaningful results for our families and communities. But now, I’m up for reelection, and have _two_ Republican challengers vying to flip this seat and reverse our progress. Election Day may seem far away, but national Republicans are already planning to invest heavily in this race to unseat us — so we need all hands on deck in the fight to reelect me for another term in Washington. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking: Friend, ahead of Thursday’s fundraising deadline, will you chip in $10 or any amount to keep me fighting for working families in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68768301/424052754/829268588?amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230827_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ5MzA5Ny0xYTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jXieW62ruusqd3svZxblM50hSMT-Kq2XROg_QAg-FM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68768303/424052756/829268588?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230827_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ5MzA5Ny0xYTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jXieW62ruusqd3svZxblM50hSMT-Kq2XROg_QAg-FM=)

And if every person who opens this message gave just $4, we’d surpass our online goal for the ENTIRE month in just ONE email. Grassroots fundraising is the backbone of our campaign, and it’s CRITICAL to our success. = | = | = That’s $4 Josh can spend directly on voter contact, digital ads, or yard signs. That’s $4 to defeat an extremist Republican agenda in North Carolina. That’s $4 to build a better future for our state – one where voting rights are defended, reproductive freedoms are protected, our schools are fully funded, and working families are put first again. And that’s $4 to help Josh Stein and Valerie Foushee post the strongest possible fundraising numbers at the end of the month. Your $4 contribution to Josh Stein’s campaign and Valerie Foushee couldn’t come at a more critical time. = Thank you for your continued support. \- All of us at Josh Stein HQ * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. subject: Bill Eigel Announces CAMPAIGN LAUNCH EVENT--RSVP NOW!!!
body:
On Friday, September 8th, Bill Eigel will formally announce his candidacy intentions for 2024... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=c00a6982d2&u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=3e14e3efb5)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# BILL EIGEL ANNOUNCES CAMPAIGN LAUNCH AND SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT ON SEPTEMBER 8TH IN ST CHARLES, MISSOURI -- RSVP NOW!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| On September 8th, I will formally announce my candidacy intentions for 2024. I am inviting you to JOIN ME for this SPECIAL CAMPAIGN ANNOUNCEMENT!

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=4f94d65851&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

Missouri is short on leadership. The Show-Me State has stagnated economically and fallen behind other big red conservative states because of a Swamp in Jefferson City that refuses to accomplish what the People desperately need. Our culture is in the midst of a war of ideas on the role of government—we need a wartime leader with the backbone and willingness to take on the powerful special interests in our state that are profiting at the expense of the People. I will be that leader, and unlike many politicians, I've **always** done what I said I was going to do.

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=58bc77a8b0&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

The Eigel for Governor Exploratory campaign started in October 2022 to determine if sufficient support and interest existed to elect a bold, conservative reformer. By every metric we set since October of 2022, we have seen an unbelievable response from the People of Missouri. Our exploratory campaign has garnered [national attention](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=3e58b08461&e=c00a6982d2) for our small dollar fundraising network. In the second quarter of 2023, Eigel received more than 41,000 donations from over 20,000 donors. At an average donation of under $20, this represents more single donations than ANY other candidate running for the Republican gubernatorial nomination in their state anywhere in the United States for 2024.

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_here_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=d91ab8f0f2&e=c00a6982d2)** _*_**

It's time for a reckoning for the Jefferson City Swamp; I will be that reckoning.

The event on September 8th will be held at Smartt Field at the St. Charles County Regional Airport. Tickets to the event are **FREE** **but[you must RSVP.](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=4c621565e7&e=c00a6982d2) Doors open at 4:30pm!**

**_*RSVP for launch_** [**_h_**](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=7c882a7040&e=c00a6982d2)**[ _ere_](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=0a0f39d565&e=c00a6982d2)**** _* or _****send an email to [mofreedom2024@gmail.com](mailto:mofreedom2024@gmail.com)**** stating your: Name, Email, Contact Phone, and Address**

**LET'S GO MISSOURI!**
---

| Hilary Franz knows how to get things done, Peter.

_**FIRST:**_ When Hilary Franz stepped into office, the Washington State Department of Natural Resources’ wildfire fighting capabilities were described as the “do not respond” agency.

_**THEN:**_ Hilary laid out a plan to secure historic new resources, develop a 20-year forest health plan, and give our firefighters the training, skills, and equipment needed to safely fight worsening wildfires.

_**NOW:**_ Washington is a national leader in wildfire fighting and prevention and forest management, all while creating sustainable-good paying jobs and delivering for our communities.

When our government is constantly stuck in disagreement, differences, and division, Hilary is working on the ground to understand our greatest problems and create solutions.

In her work across Washington, Hilary has seen communities big and small, rural and urban, struggling with the same things – housing affordability, rising costs, the impacts of climate change, and a lack of mental health care. She's ready to take the same determination she brought to solving our wildfire crisis to the Governor's office to tackle our challenges headfirst. [_**But, Peter,with our critical August fundraising deadline in just 4 days, Hilary needs your help. Will you join the movement to elect a proven leader who knows how to get things done for the people by donating $10 or whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68768589/424053656/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230827-Z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA1N2JjYWYtMWM0NS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A-bbC7mILXM6gEAU9Abh86b1s-xUvCR8mNqY-KAFzGI=)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop 15 more years of toxic pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1950021?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: The Rusty-Patched Bumblebee population has plummeted 90% in the last few decades! We need 1,249 more signatures to help save pollinators:[Sign now! >> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1950022?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** You read that right, Friend. Our pollinators are facing a “five-alarm fire.” And toxic neonicotinoid pesticides produced by Big Ag giants like Bayer-Monsanto are a key reason. They can impact bees’ ability to navigate and reproduce. Not to mention, they can KILL BEES ON CONTACT. If we don’t act soon, _**we could stand to lose hundreds of wild bee species forever.**_ We can’t let it come to that. That’s because bees play a crucial role in their environments and our food system. In fact, we rely on bees and other pollinators for a whopping 75% of the world’s food crops. That includes some of the most nutritious foods we eat. **If we lose bees, we will also lose many of the foods that keep us healthy!** The EPA has the chance to BAN bee-toxic neonics before the damage is irreversible. But instead, they _**could approve them for another 15 years!**_ Bees don’t have 15 years to wait, Friend. [**These helpful little pollinators need your support more than ever: will you add your name today and tell the EPA to ban bee-toxic neonics before it’s too late? >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1950023?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1950024?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The facts speak for themselves: neonics have made U.S. agriculture **nearly** **48x MORE TOXIC TO BEES** over the past few decades. Now, it’s harder for bees to support the crops we rely on. And that impacts people, too. Without access to vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at **higher risk of heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer** according to a recent study.
Not to mention, neonics can make their way into the very food you eat and can’t be washed off! They’ve been linked to health impacts like **birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism.**
Bee-killers like Bayer-Monsanto have shown time and again that profit is their priority. The health of pollinators, people, and the planet doesn’t matter as long as they get their pay day. And the United States EPA is giving them a free pass. Enough is enough: it’s time to stand up and demand action! [**We just need 1,249 more signatures from your area to give bees a fighting chance. Will you stand with us today?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1950025?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1950024?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking urgent action to save our pollinators!
Friends of the Earth**
|

He has even threatened to skip all the debates in the future because of his “commanding lead in the polls.” **We cannot count on any of these Republican candidates to stop Trump. clean_body: Not a good look. = Peter, Donald Trump refused to participate in the first GOP Presidential debate this week. It’s not a good look for the Republican “frontrunner” if he cannot even answer voters’ questions. Why didn’t Trump show up? Perhaps it’s because he knows that he’ll be asked tough questions about his four criminal indictments, or embarrass himself on the national stage before the election even kicks off into high gear. He has even threatened to skip all the debates in the future because of his “commanding lead in the polls.” We cannot count on any of these Republican candidates to stop Trump. It’s going to be up to us to keep Trump out of the White House and protect our democracy. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s face it: Trump is scared. Team, Wednesday night was the first GOP presidential debate — _and to no one’s surprise, it was a race to see who could be the most extreme._

Instead of talking about good-paying jobs, making healthcare more affordable, or protecting Social Security, the candidates took turns describing how they would **defund the Department of Education, attack our hardworking teachers, and weaken our public schools.**

**Greg fights for our children and families every day in Congress,_and as a former public school teacher, he knows that fighting for children means supporting their teachers._**

[**Greg will always be a champion for our public schools, teachers, and children. And with far-right politicians launching these egregious attacks, it’s more important than ever to have a former public school teacher in Congress. clean_body: As a former public school teacher, Greg knows that fighting for children means supporting their teachers. | = Team, Wednesday night was the first GOP presidential debate — and to no one’s surprise, it was a race to see who could be the most extreme. Instead of talking about good-paying jobs, making healthcare more affordable, or protecting Social Security, the candidates took turns describing how they would defund the Department of Education, attack our hardworking teachers, and weaken our public schools. subject: Before the new school year begins…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68769188/424055570/-1509228828?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.27_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmIwMzhiNy0yMTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goX955lTWD-rj1wo8MGyFKlc6Ex32LZslEIuN44tGp0=)

Friend – it’s officially back-to-school season!

This weekend, students and teachers across Oregon are packing up their backpacks, grabbing last-minute school supplies, and gearing up for the beginning of a new school year.

But as the new year begins, we’re reminded that we have a long way to go before America has an education system that is accessible, equitable, and effective for all students.

**Andrea understands the importance of a strong education system.** That’s why she’s leading the fight in Congress to ensure our educational framework prepares students for success, ensures access to diverse learning materials, mitigates educational disparities, and so much more.

**Andrea is working tirelessly to support our students & teachers, and build an education system that works for everyone** – _but she needs you in the fight alongside her._

[**We have a lot of work to do, so before the new school year begins: Will you sign our petition to stand with Andrea in her fight to build an education system that works for all Oregonians?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68769189/424055571/1810334277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmIwMzhiNy0yMTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goX955lTWD-rj1wo8MGyFKlc6Ex32LZslEIuN44tGp0=&emci=1b3123b7-7543-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb038b7-2145-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5643047)
| _[Sign the petition: Support our students>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68769190/424055572/1810334277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmIwMzhiNy0yMTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goX955lTWD-rj1wo8MGyFKlc6Ex32LZslEIuN44tGp0=&emci=1b3123b7-7543-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb038b7-2145-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5643047)_
---

Thank you for showing your support. And to all the students and teachers across Oregon’s 6th District heading back to school: Have a great first day and an excellent school year!
