clean_body: = Friend – it’s officially back-to-school season! This weekend, students and teachers across Oregon are packing up their backpacks, grabbing last-minute school supplies, and gearing up for the beginning of a new school year. But as the new year begins, we’re reminded that we have a long way to go before America has an education system that is accessible, equitable, and effective for all students. Andrea understands the importance of a strong education system. That’s why she’s leading the fight in Congress to ensure our educational framework prepares students for success, ensures access to diverse learning materials, mitigates educational disparities, and so much more. Andrea is working tirelessly to support our students & teachers, and build an education system that works for everyone – but she needs you in the fight alongside her. | Thank you for showing your support. And to all the students and teachers across Oregon’s 6th District heading back to school: Have a great first day and an excellent school year! – Team Salinas | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

|

Peter, Studies have shown that, on average, male candidates raise about one-third more than women running for the same seats. This fundraising gap is even larger for Black, brown, and other women of color. In over 90% of House of Representatives elections, the candidate who spends more wins. It’s that simple. Money shouldn’t be the reason our candidates win or lose — **but it almost always is. ** So when we say our candidates are underfunded, and rely on groups like HER Time to make up the difference, it’s not just empty words. And when we say we’re behind on our July fundraising goal, and we may have to scale back our support for our frontline candidates, **that may mean the difference between winning or losing on Election Day.** [_**That’s why I’m coming to you today to ask: Can I count on your support today to contribute any amount to help level the playing field for our women candidates?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68769197/424055635/-529510226?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc2ODI0MWYtMjM0NS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1BPE5mfHZ1Q3Dh5f76g54ueaqaRLXzYuNu5zbhKKQY0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68769198/424055636/-529510226?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc2ODI0MWYtMjM0NS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1BPE5mfHZ1Q3Dh5f76g54ueaqaRLXzYuNu5zbhKKQY0=)

body:
We’re building a grassroots campaign that’s stronger than any of the Republicans' dark money groups

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68769205/424055645/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230827-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlNjgyNDFmLTIzNDUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qnj22yiOgDiVQTb45r0eV7e5HjWzDdCBZDocwHWbgSs=)

Cheers, Peter! I wanted to make sure I caught you up on where our campaign stands before you log off for the day—and maybe even grab a beer for yourself after a busy week!

You all know how much I hate asking for money, but this is serious: **According to my team, we need a surge of donations to reach our August end-of-month fundraising goal before next week’s deadline.**

body:
| There’s no telling what’s next...
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3550%2E5257348%2ELN9xNg)
Derek —
One of Donald Trump’s most ardent defenders in the Senate is back in action — and he has his eyes on Adam. Take a look at this latest tweet from Lindsey Graham:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=aug2023_abs_em.iLceiL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230827_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3550%2E5257348%2ELN9xNg)
Remember: This is the same Lindsey Graham who congratulated Adam on doing a “good job” presenting Donald Trump’s impeachment trial in the Senate.
It is also the same Lindsey Graham who tweeted this...
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=aug2023_abs_em.iLceiL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20230827_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3550%2E5257348%2ELN9xNg)
That brings us to today.
Lindsey Graham has quickly devolved into Donald Trump’s right-hand man in the Senate — including taking jabs at their favorite villain, Adam. These attacks are only going to become more egregious, especially with Trump under four criminal indictments.
There’s no telling what’s next, so we need to get ready for everything.
**[Adam will never waver in his fight to bring truth and justice to Congress — even if it means standing up to the whole world of MAGA extremists, like Donald Trump and his buddies. name: Zak M.
subject: Investing in people – not corporations.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Hey friend,

Earlier this week, I told you that our campaign is not about George Santos.

Today I want to tell you what it is about, starting with how we are going to put families and small businesses first by investing in the people who make this city great. If you support these policies, I urge you to [_chip in $5_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-econ?source=em230827-90do-5ask?amount=5&refcode2=388_8507_Ff807S&akid=388%2E8507%2EFf807S) to help put our plan into action.

Here is what I support:
* **Funding job training for growing industries** like Tech and Clean Energy so New Yorkers can play a vital role in the workplace of the future.
* **Raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour** because a hard day’s work deserves a fair paycheck.
* **Expanding tax credits** for families caring for young children and seniors so they can focus more on their loved ones and worry less about their bottom line.

**If our communities have the proper resources, there is no limit to what we can achieve.** [_If you support our plan, please consider chipping in $5 or more to help us spread the message._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-econ?source=em230827-90do-5ask?amount=5&refcode2=388_8507_Ff807S&akid=388%2E8507%2EFf807S)

[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-econ?amount=5&refcode=em20230805-20230827-el&refcode2=388_8507_Ff807S&akid=388%2E8507%2EFf807S)
---
[Donate More ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-econ?amount=25&refcode=em20230805-20230827-el&refcode2=388_8507_Ff807S&akid=388%2E8507%2EFf807S)

My entire career has been built on the belief that when we identify potential and give people the tools they need to succeed, the results are astounding.

At Student Voice, we were able to mobilize thousands of young students to fight for change in their schools and turn classroom discussions into nationwide movements.

When I founded The Next 50 and gave future leaders the resources to run their own campaigns, they saw an incredible success rate of 80%!

**Our economy works better when the government puts people first – not giant corporations and special interest groups.**

If our communities have the proper resources, there is no limit to what we can achieve.

With gratitude,
Zak Malamed

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=388%2E8507%2EFf807S)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=388%2E8507%2EFf807S)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Cinde Warmington
subject: I'm standing up against Edelblut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| Hi there,

Extremist political bias has no place in our public schools. Our education system is a critical pillar of our democracy and we must protect it.

That’s why at last week’s meeting of the Governor and Executive Council, I challenged Department of Education Commissioner Frank Edelblut on his radical PragerU proposal, which attempts to bring the controversial, right-wing platform to New Hampshire public schools.

**_[Now, I need to know if you stand with me in the fight to protect the integrity of our public schools. Let’s be clear: This radical platform is not even an accredited academic institution.

Some of their content has titles such as “Healthcare is not a Right”, “Was the Civil War About Slavery?”, and “Make Men Masculine Again” - all aimed at inspiring hate and division, not educating.

This push is yet another attempt by Frank Edelblut to undermine our public education system, like his plan to use public funds for private schools.

As governor, I will fight to bolster our public schools so that every child in New Hampshire has the opportunity to succeed and thrive. Moreover, I’ll appoint members of the Board of Education who _actually_ believe in public education.

**But, I need you with me to get there.

_[Click here to show you’re standing with our public schools.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68769346/424056293/1937111289?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_CW_20230827_FR_RR_1.1_1MO_candidate_na_na_prageru.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGMxYmEwZS0yNTQ1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VG9lI_JV6HQBJIpdc9S0K-jgDH77C7QUfrD-Xty2v1o=)_**

Thank you,

Cinde

**My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families.
I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lisa=20Evans=2C=20WA=20Vice=20Chair?=
subject: FWD: Two things WA Republicans can do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
As the Vice-Chair of the Washington State Republican Party, I also see that we are at a critical point and that is why I am so excited about the... | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=25895f2256&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Fellow Republican,

Did you see the below email from our new Chairman, Jim Walsh? The Washington State Republican Party is preparing for a fight. We need to make sure we have all Republicans and conservatives recommitted to our great cause if we are going to take back our state and win again in 2024. **Read his email below, sign the pledge, and join our growing list of 'Grassroots Club' members fueling our fight.**

Chairman Jim Walsh is the new Sheriff in town. Our leadership at the state party is going to start fighting again, we are going to take the fight to the Democrats and we are going to start winning again.

But we can't win this fight without your shared commitment. **Click on the links below and sign your pledge to join us today.**

Lisa Evans
Vice Chair
Washington State Republican Party

P.S. I signed my pledge on Wednesday morning and have been a proud member of the 'Grassroots Club' since 2020. Join me today - the fight starts now!
---
|
---
| From: Chairman Jim Walsh _Jim@wsrp.org_
Sent: Wednesday, August 23 8:45 AM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Two quick items

Peter--

As the new Chairman of the Washington State Republican Party, I see that we are at a critical point. We can find ourselves hopeless as our beautiful state is completely overtaken by the radical Left; or we can start to fight back and turn the tide of history. **I chose****to fight. And I'm asking you to join me** today.

There's no sugarcoating it: The other side has entrenched bureaucrats, the mainstream media, billionaire donors and unions all working on their behalf.... but we have YOU! Time after time, history has seen political movements and people **rise up in defiance of****tyranny**. Our time is now!

It starts with the individual and builds into a grassroots army, a body that is well organized, has a clear message and a defining purpose.

There are enough votes in Eastern Washington to overturn the whims of King County. Common-sense candidates can offer conservative ideals and win over all voters. I know. I’ve done it. The mainstream media may scoff about Republicans winning statewide. **I am telling you that we can****do it. We will accomplish all of these things. And we will do them together.** If I did not believe this, I would not have run for WSRP Chairman.
---
| [Click Here >> commit yourself to our shared cause](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=16fa736c29&e=6a281f566d "Click Here >> commit yourself to our shared cause")
---
| | There are two simple things I need you to do TODAY, so we can get started right away:

1\. Click on one of the red buttons and **sign your name to our pledge** that says you are committed to **fighting with me** for the next 15 months and reclaiming our beautiful state.

2\. On that pledge, please include your updated contact info so I can stay in touch with you via email, letters and texts with important updates from the WSRP about our **campaign plans**. We need everyone working together and on the same page if we are going to **defeat the****radical Left!**
---
| [Click Here >> sign the pledge](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=41593c608b&e=6a281f566d "Click Here >> sign the pledge")
---
| The pledge I have included with this email is a testament to your dedication to our Party and our conservative ideals. By signing it today, with thousands of other Republicans, you send a clear message that we still have Republicans in Washington ready to fight for **our****great state and Constitution**.

When you sign the pledge, also consider becoming a member of our **Grassroots Club** by making a small monthly donation of $5, $10, or even $25 to sustain our operations for the next 15 months. 100 people giving $5 a month is far more powerful than a single donor writing a one-time $5,000 check.

With your pledge, we can look forward to leading **common sense** back to victory!

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | There are two simple things we need you to do TODAY so we can get started right away:

1\. We need you to click on one of the red buttons and sign your name to our pledge that says you are committed to fighting with me for the next 15 months and reclaiming our great state from the radical left.

2\. On that pledge, please include your updated contact info so I can stay in touch with you via email and mailed letters with important updates from the WSRP regarding our campaign plans. We need everyone working together and on the same page if we are going to defeat the Democrats.
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/smooth-transition-1341360?e=6a281f566d)

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: What Republicans said about abortion in last week’s debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=647%2E135344%2Erj7SLJ)

Friend --
This week, amid the hubbub of the first GOP debate, you may have missed a theme beneath the big headlines: eight Republicans stood on stage and made it clear that if any one of them is in the White House, the right to choose will be under attack – and 7 out of 8 spoke up to support a federal ban on abortion.
**To be clear on what a federal ban would do:** a federal ban would come via a bill in the Republican-held House and Senate that would supersede any and all state laws passed to allow for abortion. That would mean National Republicans would decide what a woman can and cannot do in a place like Michigan, even though we passed a constitutional amendment to codify Roe in our state.
After the striking down of Roe a year ago, and the non-stop legal cases and bills to further curb access in the states, **we have to believe what National Republicans are telling us: It was never just about Roe.**
If this Republican party is allowed to take the White House and the Senate, they *will* move to try to ban abortion at the federal level. And they won’t let voters get in their way.
We’ve already seen the these attacks take shape in GOP-held Congress: Right now, Republicans are working to insert language into our federal budget that would ban people from getting the abortion-inducing drug mifepristone – which can be used up to 10 weeks after conception -- through the mail rather than via in-person visits to providers.
This is on top of going after women who serve in the US military by GOP-controlled bills, and Senator Tommy Tuberville holding up 300+ generals and admirals’ confirmation until women in uniform are banned from traveling to another state for an abortion.
These constant attacks make it very clear that National Republicans will not stop until there is a full federal ban on abortion for every woman in America.
We’ll be frank: **Our best line of defense against these attacks on reproductive healthcare at the federal level is to ensure Democrats maintain control of the White House and the Senate -- and to elect Senators who will vote to end the filibuster as we know it so we can codify Roe into federal law, as we’ve done in the House.**
[**But public polling has made it clear that the path to do so will hinge on what happens right here in Michigan. With both our race for Senate and the Presidential race at a statistical dead-heat, we can’t take anything for granted. That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $3 now to help push back on attacks on choice, keep Michigan blue, and send Elissa to the U.S. Senate?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-august23.skpj0d&refcode=em230827-1-30&t=2&akid=647%2E135344%2Erj7SLJ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-august23.Lp0z2r&refcode=em230827-1-30&t=21&akid=647%2E135344%2Erj7SLJ)**
---
****

body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=IDGOPyGp4Jg6SXXtHiFEoP9fTrEolgukv9yLfig46200imefia%2BuA%2BqpQJegjMYXcjUs3Tdha0bnKYx53bChQSaP6TtDJ71ucuOgN0A43tC5ecJ%2Bb28BYSqYCaCP3Mw7KpeFJQKDkAFo4lCYHbZc2MEBkScD1xDJtledcjXj9YuQ4F4meMFcVf8XH605RAIXjhliTOvsAXI9jROgLd%2BGSNkRNpiWF5CLkQ4Y6uszBCTAzgtrJpsgHr1LIjlLKteezo%2BKfQ1IQq69wo7v7eZyj8fF%2BgayITakY0xOj7f1nVEWndeNwEiOkVvxPL%2BI%2Fz7LFzpVSQMSRzrSBDx%2B3SlT4T8xcIv%2FNxwMdlp9%2Bs7zecffMS%2BS04eeMHD2ByC6rMVSLimpIDp%2BAeEeDbdUsWf6H7Kf33EuJ5p10CXFiT7ucxYk1bl1DOu5j03LJ2A5D%2BrC .
Peter, have you heard the news out of Florida?
Former Congresswoman Debbie Mucarsel-Powell just launched her campaign to DEFEAT extremist Republican Sen. Rick Scott! This is one of our best — and only — chances to expand our Senate majority in 2024.
Experts are already saying that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection — and early polling puts Debbie ONE POINT AHEAD in this neck-and-neck race. But last time around, Scott spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.
Debbie is counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors like you to build a war chest capable of taking on Rick Scott’s money machine in this critical battleground race. Please, will you split $10 or more between Debbie and Roland Gutierrez before midnight to become a Founding Donor in our fight to flip Florida blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Rick Scott is one of the worst Republicans in Washington. His radical policies are even too extreme for Mitch McConnell! If he had things his way, he’d end Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on working families, and ban abortions nationwide.
But here’s the good news: As Scott has grown more radical and unpopular, his favorability ratings and chances of winning reelection have PLUMMETED. He won his seat last time with only 0.12% of the vote — and now, experts at CNN, Roll Call, and FiveThirtyEight are calling Florida one of Democrats’ best pickup opportunities in 2024.
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running against him to defend our democracy, strengthen our economy, stop gun violence, and protect reproductive rights. In an election year as critical as 2024, we must take advantage of this incredible opportunity to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.
With Rick Scott sitting on a massive war chest, the only way Debbie can fight back and win is with a surge of grassroots resources from people like YOU.
So please, Peter, will you split a donation right now and become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat Rick Scott and defend our majority? Together, we can show Scott that he can’t buy his way back to the Senate. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=5]

**_1988: A boy who believes serving his country in uniform is the highest calling_** **_2011: A man proud of his service & sacrifice on behalf of Americans & Afghans_** **_2021: Don 't trust our current US political & military leaders_** **_Today: Don 't want my kids to take the path I once believed in_** My name is Sam Brown. I put my life on the line in service to my country. It's a sacrifice I wouldn't take back. But our leaders in the military and in Washington D.C. today are an absolute disappointment. __**[That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d68000001f974d939f8e5245e4f8e40e&_e=CDrWQ5tI1uD78wahwzLjwsfserfiZf6RlOA9kDLEEKfpuXqPeLvmZKSw5a6sa9rsOysiRGs5JUe8zZCb89GLyeUS_kpkPPA-6W3jFm2VXsfY23BCMWZbAvncGGDexIdmp8sYD6GNlxaiAgQFTgDaYBMvIb74gEztNZY1V1LWIE9J2z40j1B4osVQrvLH1vaApDVbrKnnpyuby0xedLE3VFBurLR_RqgTJEomPekIioOXjFJoiRPJcngSX-wX_W5Fy-lTY3RIwmLmjZhcjYO2FwwWH3P9EgEsCviHVWvB4apKWbdenz57woqSu1P7k22mIimyLBfY8B7zsD8AfUjEgAk1QdRmf4Q72asruGJ8YiUWBYVRLtrqgGhot5fkHXaxdvcAY10XVern3DzJikV-zkYUO0d_eY7KFbue_s-ieWYwS8_AY14wn9eTZqkJQPeyu0P6RM7i6zecRIFlHcIsQ2zCL5wuaRBcWFWXtTzCH1A%3D)**__ Friend, if YOU AGREE that we need to turn our country around... If you agree that America needs new leaders who know what it means to serve their country before they serve themselves... If you agree that Joe Biden and his far left-wing policies are taking America in the WRONG direction... **[Would you consider chipping in a small donation to my campaign today?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d68000001f974d939f8e5245e4f8e40e&_e=CDrWQ5tI1uD78wahwzLjwsfserfiZf6RlOA9kDLEEKfpuXqPeLvmZKSw5a6sa9rsOysiRGs5JUe8zZCb89GLyeUS_kpkPPA-6W3jFm2VXsfY23BCMWZbAvncGGDexIdmp8sYD6GNlxaiAgQFTgDaYBMvIb74gEztNZY1V1LWIE9J2z40j1B4osVQrvLH1vaApDVbrKnnpyuby0xedLE3VFBurLR_RqgTJEomPekIioOXjFJoiRPJcngSX-wX_W5Fy-lTY3RIwmLmjZhcjYO2FwwWH3P9EgEsCviHVWvB4apKWbdenz57woqSu1P7k22mIimyLBfY8B7zsD8AfUjEgMR18oDYP4vqGgWr5OYloY_IC7BfHPyIXitbtNcpAQCFyltXMI9AR2JT_T4SiAnW4d_JZ8AOqdNSJbpXvIFuEXNhtV4AHJubMxWPou9V-Z_EPAJ6b_9grAOMW62D_SMrx0IMayGSKJXyo34-UEp7puk%3D)** Anything you can give will go a long way. Thank you in advance.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: My father was just ARRESTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
They're trying to intimidate the American people...

They're trying to intimidate the American people...
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=46fa056c049e404bbb5ed3c79b11a6f7&_e=OXg1TCR7gu_IoJWKz1-SsuYuWGtsCuhxVok8PJGnG6jNHOgE9VxA5ZU_32KXXjCPAvn26z7cPRIh6-s2dCHLo15ETJuSMukSWF_LdCoTicZyRC5QoTK9tP_bQ0IJvSt1lYqzHvg6_hzhUypLNKcWv1LwMMfd1-yILi7J-5vzOgCSVRFRDuK7piiAFUwWYjGHr16aT1tqYdwqPvZm2xmKZU69FDgPTO_0lidQobLBcJksCL4WER93UNfqU93LlMzNhbkDIOgadGyXA93NZ_4tYoCG9slLUR_fnResHnXWX1CPq0Wtz3fGNQSCp-mw-z2ldGWElnsCSfRpaomO0nGT8jpIgmG7lHfSRj3W6BDq6RQW9dqY0kNYVEpkkbLUhlukmzF5FxM8XdaWeneJmQzGl_Lqu6LTyRgL6bmGZIR1voQ%3D)
---
Friend,
This is truly a sad day for America.
First, Crooked Joe and his accomplices indicted my father as an innocent man _four_ times to try and eliminate their chief political rival.
And now, they've officially ARRESTED him and turned it into a made-for-TV spectacle.
Why? Because they want to ensure that every screen in America today reminds you of what these witch hunts are really all about: _fear. _
The fear that if you call out the broken establishment, cast off the political ruling class, and stand up for the forgotten men and women of our country, then you too could be indicted, arrested, or even imprisoned.
_This is how far they will go to try and**INTIMIDATE** you out of voting for the one candidate who will always put our country - and YOU - first. _
It's truly sickening to see what has become of the freest nation on earth.

clean_body: They're trying to intimidate the American people... They're trying to intimidate the American people... | | | Friend, This is truly a sad day for America. First, Crooked Joe and his accomplices indicted my father as an innocent man four times to try and eliminate their chief political rival. And now, they've officially ARRESTED him and turned it into a made-for-TV spectacle. Why? Because they want to ensure that every screen in America today reminds you of what these witch hunts are really all about: fear. The fear that if you call out the broken establishment, cast off the political ruling class, and stand up for the forgotten men and women of our country, then you too could be indicted, arrested, or even imprisoned. This is how far they will go to try andINTIMIDATE you out of voting for the one candidate who will always put our country - and YOU - first. It's truly sickening to see what has become of the freest nation on earth. But while these witch-hunt crazed radicals believe they're scaring voters away from our movement, the reality is they've only made us that much STRONGER. They've revealed to the American people the TRUE extent of their Third World tyranny. And by this time tomorrow, our movement will be TWICE as strong and more UNITED than ever before! Which is why I want to show my father a list of ALL the patriots who stood by his side while he was being unjustly arrested and made a contribution to SAVE America. | Thank you for all your support, | Donald Trump Jr. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Fetterman
subject: They’re attacking Gisele…again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
“Liberals only want one thing...and it’s disgusting.”
^That’s *literally* the first sentence of the latest right-wing article attacking Gisele. Gotta love the drama. 😂😂😂
(The Daily Caller is big mad because Gisele made a joke on Twitter, in case you were wondering. Humor’s not exactly their strong suit.)
But seriously — we’ve always expected the right wing media to come for John. And they have, relentlessly. That’s kind of just part of the deal when you run for Senate (and beat the GOP). But you know what shouldn’t be part of the deal? **Absurd, personal attacks on Gisele.**
Gisele is not a U.S. Senator. She’s a mom protecting her kids, a spouse by John’s side, and a woman who has stepped up in unbelievable ways for her family.
**Attacks on Gisele are bullshit, full stop. And they are completely over the line.**
**[So we’re asking: Can you make a donation of ANY amount to show your support + help us defend Gisele (and John) against the nonstop attacks from the right-wing media?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230827-1?refcode=em20230827-1-8524&refcode2=8524_434096_--Ry9N&akid=8524%2E434096%2E--Ry9N)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230827-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230827-8524&refcode2=8524_434096_--Ry9N&akid=8524%2E434096%2E--Ry9N)**
The sexist attacks might keep coming — but we’re never going to stand by and let them slide.
Thank you for having Gisele and John’s backs,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230827-8524-footer&t=1&refcode2=8524_434096_--Ry9N&akid=8524%2E434096%2E--Ry9N)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8524%2E434096%2E--Ry9N)

body:

| |
---
| | Peter,

It seems like the pandemic panic is bubbling up again. Masking beginning in colleges, warning of waste water COVID, and the typical fear mongering is beginning again. As I've said over and over, you are called for such a time as this. It's time to be prepared and be equipped for the coming events. That's why I'd like you to attend the [Global Health Freedom Summit](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=0a364dd69d&e=9828080a05) on September 30th. Hear from leading Health Freedom voices, so you can be empowered to use your voice again when the triad of tyranny (big government, big pharma, and big tech) try to hijack the conversation.

Please use my coupon code: [HEALTH](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=bbafa1b80e&e=9828080a05) to get 15% off your ticket. You can either attend in person in Alexandria MN or online. Don't miss this! [Click the flyer below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f12d063782&e=9828080a05) to get more information and tickets:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=efe6254bd5&e=9828080a05)
---
| We will gather, have critical conversations, and be educated/prepared by frontline voices who put it all on the line in 2020. This event is nearly sold out, so it's critical to get in today. This summit could not be at a more-important time.

Will these people try what they tried last time? Will you and your family be prepared and educated this time? Will we speak with one voice for health freedom and parental rights? Your attendance is a crucial first step in answering these questions.

[Use coupon code HEALTH and we'll see you at the 2023 Summit.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f33f3ccbac&e=9828080a05)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Hello from Wisconsin!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Now more than ever, we need to stand strong with Tammy as she heads into what may be her toughest and most expensive election yet.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
Hey Peter, this is Arizona Senator Mark Kelly. I recently joined my good friend and Senate colleague, Tammy Baldwin, on the campaign trail in Wisconsin. We sat down with veterans to talk about our work to expand VA health care and benefits and stopped by the state fair — where I got to try my first Wisconsin cream puff! [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL) **Now more than ever, we need to stand strong with Tammy as she heads into what will be her most competitive and expensive election yet.** Last year, the GOP threw everything but the sink at me trying to flip my seat. My opponent was as far-right as they come, and he had nearly unlimited resources from Mitch McConnell, wealthy dark-money donors, and national Republicans to run attacks against me. But with your grassroots support, we focused on our mission: delivering results for hard-working people, keeping our Democratic Senate majority, and defeating MAGA extremism at the ballot box. **It’s time to do the same for Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin.** National Republicans are recruiting far-right mega-millionaires to run against Tammy — people who are out-of-touch with the needs of Wisconsinites and have enough resources to write themselves $15 to $20 million campaign checks. Tammy is relying on the support of this incredible grassroots team to help her fight back. That’s why I’m asking: **[Can you pitch in a few bucks to help re-elect Tammy and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Grassroots donations were critical to winning my battleground race in Arizona last year, and I know they’ll make all the difference as we fight to keep Wisconsin blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ePE894&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-aug23.zLGT51&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-aug23.1j8eqa&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-aug23.gxXXqd&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-aug23.Efq4iZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230827_PM2_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)
---
Thank you,
Mark
P.S. I appreciated the warm welcome I received in Wisconsin. It was great to meet so many of you, even some fellow Arizonans. Looking forward to my next visit already!
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1058%2E35263%2ElWi8EL)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
